75 // ************************************************** TRANSMITTER CODE **************************************************
76 
77 #define CHANNELSUSED 16 // 16 Channels
78 #define MAXMIXES 32 // 32 mixes
79 #define TICKSPERMINUTE 60000 // millis() += 60000 per minute
80 #define PROPOCHANNELS 8 // Only 4 have knobs / 2 sticks (= 4 hall sensors)
81 #define FLIGHTMODESWITCH 4 // Default MODE switch
82 #define AUTOSWITCH 1 // Default AUTO switch
83 #define DEFAULTPIPEADDRESS 0xBABE1E5420LL // Pipe address for startup - any value but MUST match RX
84 #define LOWBATTERY 35 // percent for warning
85 #define BAD_CHANNEL_MAX 40 // WAS 96 -- NEEDS TO BE *ALWAYS* LESS THAN SELECTED HOPPING RANGE ****
86 #define CE_PIN 9 // for SPI to nRF24L01
87 #define CSN_PIN 10 // for SPI to nRF24L01
88 #define INACTIVITYTIMEOUT 10 // Default time after which to switch off
89 #define INACTIVITYMINIMUM 5 * TICKSPERMINUTE // Inactivity timeout minimum is 5 minutes
90 #define INACTIVITYMAXIMUM 30 * TICKSPERMINUTE // Inactivity timeout maximum is 30 minutes
91 #define DS1307_ADDRESS 0x68
92 
93 // CurrentMode values (=WHETHER TO SEND DATA)
94 
95 #define NORMAL 0 // Normal for transmit as usual
96 #define CALIBRATELIMITS 1 // Calibrate limits
97 #define CENTRESTICKS 2 // Calibrate Centres
98 #define SCANWAVEBAND 3 // Scan waveband
99 #define SENDNOTHING 4 // Transmission off
100 
101 // VALUES FOR MAX SERVO RESOLUTION
102 
103 #define EXTRAMICROS 500
104 #define MINMICROS 1000 - EXTRAMICROS
105 #define MAXMICROS 2000 + EXTRAMICROS
106 #define HALFMICROSRANGE (MAXMICROS - MINMICROS) / 2 // = 500
107 #define MIDMICROS MINMICROS + HALFMICROSRANGE
108

220 // ************************************* AckPayload structure ******************************************************
221 struct Payload
222 {
223  uint8_t Purpose; // Defines meaning of the remainder
224  // Highest BIT of Purpose means Ignore IF ON
225  uint8_t volt;
226  uint8_t CurrentAltitude;
227  uint8_t Pitch;
228  uint8_t Roll;
229  uint8_t Yaw;
230 };
231 Payload AckPayload;
232 uint8_t AckPayloadSize = sizeof(AckPayload);
233 // *****************************************************************************************************************

467 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
468 
469 void ReviseBadChannelMax(){
470 
471 BadChannelMax =((FHSSTop - FHSSBottom)/4) * 3; // Max number of channels to avoid must not exceed 3/4 of available channels
472 
473 }
474 
475 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
476 
477 uint8_t decToBcd(uint8_t val)
478 {
479  return ((val / 10 * 16) + (val % 10));
480 }
481 
482 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
483 
484 uint8_t bcdToDec(uint8_t val)
485 {
486  return ((val / 16 * 10) + (val % 16));
487 }
488 
489 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
490 
491 void AdjustDateTime(uint8_t MinChange, uint8_t HourChange, uint8_t YearChange, uint8_t MonthChange, uint8_t DateChange)
492 {
493  uint8_t second = tm.Second; // 0-59
494  uint8_t minute = tm.Minute; // 0-59
495  uint8_t hour = tm.Hour; // 0-23
496  uint8_t weekDay = tm.Wday; // 1-7
497  uint8_t monthDay = tm.Day; // 1-31
498  uint8_t month = tm.Month; // 1-12
499  uint8_t year = tm.Year; // 0-99
500  minute += MinChange;
501  if (minute > 59) {
502  minute = 0;
503  if (hour < 23) {
504  hour++;
505  }
506  }
507  if (minute < 1) {
508  minute = 0;
509  if (hour > 0) {
510  hour--;
511  }
512  }
513  hour += HourChange;
514  if (hour < 0) hour = 0;
515  if (hour > 23) hour = 23;
516  year += YearChange;
517  if (year < 0) year = 0;
518  if (year > 99) year = 99;
519  month += MonthChange;
520  if (month < 1) month = 1;
521  if (month > 12) month = 12;
522  monthDay += DateChange;
523  if (monthDay < 1) monthDay = 1;
524  if (monthDay > 31) monthDay = 31;
525  year -= 30;
526  second = 0;
527  Wire.beginTransmission(DS1307_ADDRESS);
528  Wire.write(zero); //stop Oscillator
529  Wire.write(decToBcd(second));
530  Wire.write(decToBcd(minute));
531  Wire.write(decToBcd(hour));
532  Wire.write(decToBcd(weekDay));
533  Wire.write(decToBcd(monthDay));
534  Wire.write(decToBcd(month));
535  Wire.write(decToBcd(year));
536  Wire.write(zero); //start
537  Wire.endTransmission();
538 }
539 
540 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
541 
542 void IncMinute()
543 {
544  uint8_t c = 1;
545  if (RTC.read(tm)) {
546  AdjustDateTime(c, zero, zero, zero, zero);
547  }
548 }
549 
550 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
551 
552 void DecMinute()
553 {
554  uint8_t c = -1;
555  if (RTC.read(tm)) {
556  AdjustDateTime(c, zero, zero, zero, zero);
557  }
558 }
559 
560 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
561 
562 void IncHour()
563 {
564  uint8_t c = 1;
565  if (RTC.read(tm)) {
566  AdjustDateTime(zero, c, zero, zero, zero);
567  }
568 }
569 
570 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
571 
572 void DecHour()
573 {
574  uint8_t c = -1;
575  if (RTC.read(tm)) {
576  AdjustDateTime(zero, c, zero, zero, zero);
577  }
578 }
579 
580 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
581 
582 void IncYear()
583 {
584  uint8_t c = 1;
585  if (RTC.read(tm)) {
586  AdjustDateTime(zero, zero, c, zero, zero);
587  }
588 }
589 
590 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
591 
592 void DecYear()
593 {
594  uint8_t c = -1;
595  if (RTC.read(tm)) {
596  AdjustDateTime(zero, zero, c, zero, zero);
597  }
598 }
599 
600 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
601 
602 void IncMonth()
603 {
604  uint8_t c = 1;
605  if (RTC.read(tm)) {
606  AdjustDateTime(zero, zero, zero, c, zero);
607  }
608 }
609 
610 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
611 
612 void DecMonth()
613 {

615  if (RTC.read(tm)) {
616  AdjustDateTime(zero, zero, zero, c, zero);
617  }
618 }
619 
620 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
621 
622 void IncDate()
623 {
624  uint8_t c = 1;
625  if (RTC.read(tm)) {
626  AdjustDateTime(zero, zero, zero, zero, c);
627  }
628 }
629 
630 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
631 
632 void DecDate()
633 {
634  uint8_t c = -1;
635  if (RTC.read(tm)) {
636  AdjustDateTime(zero, zero, zero, zero, c);
637  }
638 }
639 
640 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
641 
642 bool getTime(const char* str)
643 {
644  int Hour, Min, Sec;
645  if (sscanf(str, "%d:%d:%d", &Hour, &Min, &Sec) != 3) return false;
646  tm.Hour = Hour;
647  tm.Minute = Min;
648  tm.Second = Sec;
649  return true;
650 }
651 
652 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
653 
654 bool getDate(const char* str)
655 {
656  char Month[12];
657  int Day, Year;
658  uint8_t monthIndex;
659  const char* monthName[12] = {
660  "Jan", "Feb", "Mar", "Apr", "May", "Jun",
661  "Jul", "Aug", "Sep", "Oct", "Nov", "Dec"};
662  if (sscanf(str, "%s %d %d", Month, &Day, &Year) != 3) return false;
663  for (monthIndex = 0; monthIndex < 12; monthIndex++) {
664  if (strcmp(Month, monthName[monthIndex]) == 0) break;
665  }
666  if (monthIndex >= 12) return false;
667  tm.Day = Day;
668  tm.Month = monthIndex + 1;
669  tm.Year = CalendarYrToTm(Year);
670  return true;
671 }
672 
673 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
674 
675 void KickTheDog()
676 {
677 #ifdef USE_WATCHDOG
678  if (millis() - LastDogKick >= KICKRATE) {
679  LastDogKick = millis();
680  TeensyWatchDog.feed();
681  }
682 #endif
683 }
684 
685 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
686 
687 void Reboot()
688 {
689 #ifdef USE_WATCHDOG
690  for (i = 0; i < 30; i++) {
691  TeensyWatchDog.feed();
692  } // Dog will explode when overfed
693 #endif
694 }
695 
696 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
697 
698 void SendCommand(char* tbox)
699 {
700  Nextion.print(tbox);
701 
702  // Serial.print (" Nextion TEST COMMAND: "); // For wierd session
703  // Serial.println(tbox);
704 
705  for (i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
706  Nextion.write(0xff);
707  } // Send end of Input message
708 }
709 
710 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
711 
712 void SendText(char* tbox, char* NewWord)
713 {
714  char txt[] = ".txt=\"";
715  char quote[] = "\"";
716  char CB[100];
717  char TooLong[] = "Too long!";
718 
719  if (strlen(NewWord) > 90) {
720  strcpy(NewWord, TooLong);
721  }
722  strcpy(CB, tbox);
723  strcat(CB, txt);
724  strcat(CB, NewWord);
725  strcat(CB, quote);
726  SendCommand(CB);
727 }
728 
729 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
730 
731 void SendText1(char* tbox, char* NewWord)
732 {
733  char txt[] = ".txt=\"";
734  char quote[] = "\"";
735  char CB[1300];
736  char TooLong[] = "Too long!";
737 
738  if (strlen(NewWord) > 1250) {
739  strcpy(NewWord, TooLong);
740  }
741  strcpy(CB, tbox);
742  strcat(CB, txt);
743  strcat(CB, NewWord);
744  strcat(CB, quote);
745  SendCommand(CB);
746 }
747 
748 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
749 
750 char* Str(char* s, int n, int comma) // comma = 0 for nothing, 1 for a comma, 2 for a dot.
751 {
752  int r, i, m, flag;
753  char cma[] = ",";
754  char dot[] = ".";
755 
756  flag = 0;
757  i = 0;
758  m = 1000000000;
759  if (n < 0) {
760  s[0] = '-';
761  i = 1;
762  n = -n;
763  }
764  if (n == 0) {
765  s[0] = 48;
766  s[1] = 0;
767 
768  if (comma == 1) {
769  strcat(s, cma);
770  }
771  if (comma == 2) {
772  strcat(s, dot);
773  }
774  return s;
775  }
776  while (m >= 1) {
777  r = n / m;
778  if (r > 0) {
779  flag = 1;
780  } // first digit
781  if (flag == 1) {
782  s[i] = 48 + r;
783  i++;
784  s[i] = 0;
785  }
786  n -= (r * m);
787  m /= 10;
788  }
789  if (comma == 1) {
790  strcat(s, cma);
791  }
792  if (comma == 2) {
793  strcat(s, dot);
794  }
795  return s;
796 }
797 
798 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
799 
800 bool MayBeAddZero(uint8_t nn)
801 {
802  if (nn >= 0 && nn < 10) {
803  return true;
804  }
805  return false;
806 }
807 
808 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
809 
810 void ReadTime()
811 {
812  static char month[12][15] = {"January", "February", "March", "April", "May", "June", "July", "August", "Sept", "October", "November", "December"};
813  char NB[10];
814  char TimeString[50];
815  char Space[] = " ";
816  char colon[] = ":";
817  char zero[] = "0";
818 
819  char Owner[] = "Owner";
820  if (CurrentView == FrontView || CurrentView == Options_View) {
821  if (RTC.read(tm)) {
822  strcpy(TimeString, Str(NB, tm.Day, 0));
823  strcat(TimeString, Space);
824  strcat(TimeString, month[tm.Month - 1]);
825  strcat(TimeString, Space);
826  strcat(TimeString, (Str(NB, tmYearToCalendar(tm.Year), 0)));
827  strcat(TimeString, Space);
828  if (MayBeAddZero(tm.Hour)) strcat(TimeString, zero);
829  strcat(TimeString, Str(NB, tm.Hour, 0));
830  strcat(TimeString, colon);
831  if (MayBeAddZero(tm.Minute)) strcat(TimeString, zero);
832  strcat(TimeString, Str(NB, tm.Minute, 0));
833  strcat(TimeString, colon);
834  if (MayBeAddZero(tm.Second)) strcat(TimeString, zero);
835  strcat(TimeString, Str(NB, tm.Second, 0));
836  SendText(DateTime, TimeString);
837  SendText(Owner, TxName);
838  }
839  }
840 }
841 
842 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
843 
844 void StartInactvityTimeout()
845 {
846  Inactivity_Start = millis();
847 }
848 
849 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
850 
851 uint8_t GetBrightness()
852 {
853  if (LedIsBlinking) {
854  if ((millis() - BlinkTimer) > (500 / BlinkHertz)) {
855  BlinkOnPhase ^= 1;
856  BlinkTimer = millis();
857  }
858  }
859  else {
860  BlinkOnPhase = 1;
861  }
862  if (BlinkOnPhase) {
863  return 32;
864  }
865  else {
866  return 0;
867  }
868 }
869 
870 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
871 
872 void RedLedOn()
873 {
874  LedWasGreen = false;
875  analogWrite(GREENLED, 0);
876  analogWrite(BLUELED, 0);
877  analogWrite(REDLED, GetBrightness()); // Brightness is a function of blinking
878 }
879 
880  void MakeBindButtonInvisible(){
881  char bbiv[]= "vis bind,0";
882  if (BindButton){
883  SendCommand(bbiv);
884  BindButton=false;
885  }
886  }
887 
888 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
889 
890 void GreenLedOn()
891 {
892  if (!LedWasGreen) {
893  LedWasGreen = true;
894  analogWrite(BLUELED, 0);
895  analogWrite(REDLED, 0);
896  analogWrite(GREENLED, GetBrightness()); // Brightness is a function maybe blinking
897  LastShowTime = 0;
898  MakeBindButtonInvisible();
899  }
900 }
901 
902 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
903 
904 void BlueLedOn()
905 {
906  LedWasGreen = false;
907  analogWrite(REDLED, 0);
908  analogWrite(GREENLED, 0);
909  analogWrite(BLUELED, GetBrightness()); // Brightness is a function of blinking
910 }
911 
912 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
913 
914 uint16_t mp(uint8_t lowres)
915 {
916  return map(lowres, 0, 180, MINMICROS, MAXMICROS);
917 } // This returns the 5 curve-points at the higher resolution
918 
919 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
920 
921 void ClearText()
922 {
923  for (i = 0; i < CharsMax; i++) {
924  WordsIn[i] = char(0);
925  TextIn[i] = 0;
926  }
927  i = 0;
928 }
929 
930 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
931 // Nextion functions
932 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
933 
934 void EndSend()
935 {
936  for (int pp = 0; pp < 3; pp++) Nextion.write(0xff); // Send end of Input message
937  delay(65); // ** A DELAY ** (>=50 ms) is needed if an answer might come!
938 }
939 
940 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
941 
942 void SendValue(char* nbox, int value)
943 {
944  char Val[] = ".val=";
945  char CB[100];
946  char NB[25];
947  strcpy(CB, nbox);
948  strcat(CB, Val);
949  strcat(CB, Str(NB, value, 0));
950  SendCommand(CB);
951  ValueSent = true;
952 }
953 
954 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
955 
956 void GetTextIn()
957 {
958  ClearText();
959  if (Nextion.available()) {
960  delay(10);
961  while (Nextion.available()) {
962  TextIn[i] = uint8_t(Nextion.read());
963  if (i < CharsMax) i++;
964  }
965  }
966 }
967 
968 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
969 
970 int GetValue(char* nbox)
971 {
972  double ValueIn = 0;
973  char GET[] = "get ";
974  char VAL[] = ".val";
975  char CB[100];
976  strcpy(CB, GET);
977  strcat(CB, nbox);
978  strcat(CB, VAL);
979  Nextion.print(CB);
980  EndSend();
981  GetTextIn();
982  if (TextIn[0] == 'q') {
983  ValueIn = TextIn[1]; // Collect and build 32 bit value from 4 bytes
984  ValueIn += (TextIn[2] << 8);
985  ValueIn += (TextIn[3] << 16);
986  ValueIn += (TextIn[4] << 24);
987  }
988  return ValueIn;
989 }
990 
991 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
992 
993 void GetWordsIn()
994 {
995  char a = 0;
996  ClearText();
997  if (Nextion.available()) {
998  delay(10);
999  while (Nextion.available()) {
1000  a = char(Nextion.read());
1001  TextIn[i] = a;
1002  WordsIn[i] = char(a);
1003  if (i < CharsMax) i++;
1004  }
1005  WordsIn[i] = char(0);
1006  }
1007 }
1008 
1009 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
1010 
1011 bool GetButtonPress()
1012 {
1013  bool ButtonPressed = false;
1014  char a;
1015  i = 0;
1016  if (Nextion.available()) {
1017  ButtonPressed = true;
1018  delay(10);
1019  while (Nextion.available()) {
1020  a = char(Nextion.read());
1021  if (a > 31 && a < 128) {
1022  WordsIn[i] = a;
1023  WordsIn[i + 1] = char(0);
1024  }
1025  if (i < CharsMax) i++;
1026  }
1027  }
1028  return ButtonPressed;
1029 }
1030 
1031 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
1032 
1033 void SendValue1(char* nbox, int value)
1034 {
1035  char CB[100];
1036  char NB[25];
1037  strcpy(CB, nbox);
1038  strcat(CB, Str(NB, value, 0));
1039  SendCommand(CB);
1040 }
1041 
1042 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
1043 
1044 uint8_t um(uint16_t bv)
1045 {
1046  return (map(bv, MINMICROS, MAXMICROS, 0, 100)); // lower res is enough on display
1047 }
1048 
1049 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
1050 
1051 void CheckTimer()
1052 {
1053  if (FlightMode < 4 && !LostContactFlag) {
1054  Secs = ((millis() - TimerMillis) / 1000) + PausedSecs;
1055  Hours = Secs / 3600;
1056  Secs %= 3600;
1057  Mins = Secs / 60;
1058  Secs %= 60;
1059  }
1060  if (CurrentView == FrontView) {
1061  if (LastSeconds != Secs) {
1062  SendValue(FrontView_Secs, Secs);
1063  SendValue(FrontView_Mins, Mins);
1064  SendValue(FrontView_Hours, Hours);
1065  LastSeconds = Secs;
1066  }
1067  }
1068 }
1069 
1070 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
1071 
1072 void ShowServoPos()
1073 {
1074  char SticksView_Ch1[] = "Ch1";
1075  char SticksView_Ch2[] = "Ch2";
1076  char SticksView_Ch3[] = "Ch3";
1077  char SticksView_Ch4[] = "Ch4";
1078  char SticksView_Ch5[] = "Ch5";
1079  char SticksView_Ch6[] = "Ch6";
1080  char SticksView_Ch7[] = "Ch7";
1081  char SticksView_Ch8[] = "Ch8";
1082  char SticksView_Ch9[] = "Ch9";
1083  char SticksView_Ch10[] = "Ch10";
1084  char SticksView_Ch11[] = "Ch11";
1085  char SticksView_Ch12[] = "Ch12";
1086  char SticksView_Ch13[] = "Ch13";
1087  char SticksView_Ch14[] = "Ch14";
1088  char SticksView_Ch15[] = "Ch15";
1089  char SticksView_Ch16[] = "Ch16";
1090  char CalibrateView_Ch1[] = "Ch1";
1091  char CalibrateView_Ch2[] = "Ch2";
1092  char CalibrateView_Ch3[] = "Ch3";
1093  char CalibrateView_Ch4[] = "Ch4";
1094  char CalibrateView_Ch5[] = "Ch5";
1095  char CalibrateView_Ch6[] = "Ch6";
1096  char CalibrateView_Ch7[] = "Ch7";
1097  char CalibrateView_Ch8[] = "Ch8";
1098  char ChannelInput[] = "Input";
1099  char ChannelOutput[] = "Output";
1100 
1101  int l = 0;
1102  int l1 = 0;
1103  int LeastDistance = 2; // if the change is small, don't re-display anything - to reduce flashing.
1104 
1105  if (CurrentView == CalibrateView) {
1106  if (abs(SendBuffer[0] - ShownBuffer[0]) > LeastDistance) {
1107  SendValue(CalibrateView_Ch1, um(SendBuffer[0]));
1108  ShownBuffer[0] = SendBuffer[0];
1109  }
1110  if (abs(SendBuffer[1] - ShownBuffer[1]) > LeastDistance) {
1111  SendValue(CalibrateView_Ch2, um(SendBuffer[1]));
1112  ShownBuffer[1] = SendBuffer[1];
1113  }
1114  if (abs(SendBuffer[2] - ShownBuffer[2]) > LeastDistance) {
1115  SendValue(CalibrateView_Ch3, um(SendBuffer[2]));
1116  ShownBuffer[2] = SendBuffer[2];
1117  }
1118  if (abs(SendBuffer[3] - ShownBuffer[3]) > LeastDistance) {
1119  SendValue(CalibrateView_Ch4, um(SendBuffer[3]));
1120  ShownBuffer[3] = SendBuffer[3];
1121  }
1122  if (abs(SendBuffer[4] - ShownBuffer[4]) > LeastDistance) {
1123  SendValue(CalibrateView_Ch5, um(SendBuffer[4]));
1124  ShownBuffer[4] = SendBuffer[4];
1125  }
1126  if (abs(SendBuffer[5] - ShownBuffer[5]) > LeastDistance) {
1127  SendValue(CalibrateView_Ch6, um(SendBuffer[5]));
1128  ShownBuffer[5] = SendBuffer[5];
1129  }
1130  if (abs(SendBuffer[6] - ShownBuffer[6]) > LeastDistance) {
1131  SendValue(CalibrateView_Ch7, um(SendBuffer[6]));
1132  ShownBuffer[6] = SendBuffer[6];
1133  }
1134  if (abs(SendBuffer[7] - ShownBuffer[7]) > LeastDistance) {
1135  SendValue(CalibrateView_Ch8, um(SendBuffer[7]));
1136  ShownBuffer[7] = SendBuffer[7];
1137  }
1138  }
1139  if (CurrentView == SticksView) {
1140  if (abs(SendBuffer[0] - ShownBuffer[0]) > LeastDistance) {
1141  SendValue(SticksView_Ch1, um(SendBuffer[0]));
1142  ShownBuffer[0] = SendBuffer[0];
1143  }
1144  if (abs(SendBuffer[1] - ShownBuffer[1]) > LeastDistance) {
1145  SendValue(SticksView_Ch2, um(SendBuffer[1]));
1146  ShownBuffer[1] = SendBuffer[1];
1147  }
1148  if (abs(SendBuffer[2] - ShownBuffer[2]) > LeastDistance) {
1149  SendValue(SticksView_Ch3, um(SendBuffer[2]));
1150  ShownBuffer[2] = SendBuffer[2];
1151  }
1152  if (abs(SendBuffer[3] - ShownBuffer[3]) > LeastDistance) {
1153  SendValue(SticksView_Ch4, um(SendBuffer[3]));
1154  ShownBuffer[3] = SendBuffer[3];
1155  }
1156  if (abs(SendBuffer[4] - ShownBuffer[4]) > LeastDistance) {
1157  SendValue(SticksView_Ch5, um(SendBuffer[4]));
1158  ShownBuffer[4] = SendBuffer[4];
1159  }
1160  if (abs(SendBuffer[5] - ShownBuffer[5]) > LeastDistance) {
1161  SendValue(SticksView_Ch6, um(SendBuffer[5]));
1162  ShownBuffer[5] = SendBuffer[5];
1163  }
1164  if (abs(SendBuffer[6] - ShownBuffer[6]) > LeastDistance) {
1165  SendValue(SticksView_Ch7, um(SendBuffer[6]));
1166  ShownBuffer[6] = SendBuffer[6];
1167  }
1168  if (abs(SendBuffer[7] - ShownBuffer[7]) > LeastDistance) {
1169  SendValue(SticksView_Ch8, um(SendBuffer[7]));
1170  ShownBuffer[7] = SendBuffer[7];
1171  }
1172  if (abs(SendBuffer[8] - ShownBuffer[8]) > LeastDistance) {
1173  SendValue(SticksView_Ch9, um(SendBuffer[8]));
1174  ShownBuffer[8] = SendBuffer[8];
1175  }
1176  if (abs(SendBuffer[9] - ShownBuffer[9]) > LeastDistance) {
1177  SendValue(SticksView_Ch10, um(SendBuffer[9]));
1178  ShownBuffer[9] = SendBuffer[9];
1179  }
1180  if (abs(SendBuffer[10] - ShownBuffer[10]) > LeastDistance) {
1181  SendValue(SticksView_Ch11, um(SendBuffer[10]));
1182  ShownBuffer[10] = SendBuffer[10];
1183  }
1184  if (abs(SendBuffer[11] - ShownBuffer[11]) > LeastDistance) {
1185  SendValue(SticksView_Ch12, um(SendBuffer[11]));
1186  ShownBuffer[11] = SendBuffer[11];
1187  }
1188  if (abs(SendBuffer[12] - ShownBuffer[12]) > LeastDistance) {
1189  SendValue(SticksView_Ch13, um(SendBuffer[12]));
1190  ShownBuffer[12] = SendBuffer[12];
1191  }
1192  if (abs(SendBuffer[13] - ShownBuffer[13]) > LeastDistance) {
1193  SendValue(SticksView_Ch14, um(SendBuffer[13]));
1194  ShownBuffer[13] = SendBuffer[13];
1195  }
1196  if (abs(SendBuffer[14] - ShownBuffer[14]) > LeastDistance) {
1197  SendValue(SticksView_Ch15, um(SendBuffer[14]));
1198  ShownBuffer[14] = SendBuffer[14];
1199  }
1200  if (abs(SendBuffer[15] - ShownBuffer[15]) > LeastDistance) {
1201  SendValue(SticksView_Ch16, um(SendBuffer[15]));
1202  ShownBuffer[15] = SendBuffer[15];
1203  }
1204  }
1205  if (CurrentView == GraphView) { // Display current stick and output values
1206  if (ChanneltoSet <= 8) {
1207  l = (InPutStick[ChanneltoSet - 1]);
1208  l1 = analogRead(AnalogueInput[l]);
1209  if (l1 <= ChannelCentre[l]) {
1210  SendValue(ChannelInput, map(l1, ChannelCentre[l], ChannelMin[l], 0, -100));
1211  }
1212  else {
1213  SendValue(ChannelInput, map(l1, ChannelCentre[l], ChannelMax[l], 0, 100));
1214  }
1215  SendValue(ChannelOutput, map(SendBuffer[ChanneltoSet - 1], MINMICROS, MAXMICROS, -100, 100));
1216  }
1217  }
1218  else {
1219  SendValue(ChannelInput, 0);
1220  SendValue(ChannelOutput, 0);
1221  }
1222 }
1223 
1224 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
1225 
1227 void ShowComms()
1228 {
1229  bool ShowNow = false;
1230  char na[] = "";
1231  char FrontView_Connected[] = "Connected";
1232  char FrontView_AckPayload[] = "AckPayload";
1233  char FrontView_RXBV[] = "RXBV";
1234  char FrontView_TXBV[] = "TXBV";
1235  char Not_Connected[] = "Not connected";
1236  char Msg_Connected[] = "** Connected! **";
1237  char DataView_pps[] = "pps";
1238  char DataView_lps[] = "lps";
1239  char DataView_Alt[] = "alt";
1240  char DataView_MaxAlt[] = "MaxAlt";
1241  char DataView_roll[] = "roll";
1242  char DataView_pitch[] = "pitch";
1243  char DataView_yaw[] = "yaw";
1244  char DataView_txv[] = "txv";
1245  char DataView_rxv[] = "rxv";
1246  char DataView_chav[] = "chav";
1247  char DataView_Ls[] = "Ls";
1248  char DataView_Ts[] = "Ts";
1249  char DataView_Sc[] = "Success";
1250  char DataView_Rx[] = "rx";
1251  char WarnNow[] = "vis Warning,1";
1252  char WarnOff[] = "vis Warning,0";
1253  char TXVolts[] = "t21";
1254  float Volts = 0;
1255  char Vbuf[12];
1256  char pc[] = "%";
1257  char v[] = "V, ";
1258  float txv = 0;
1259  int txpc = 0;
1260  char LiFe2s[] = " 2s LiFe, ";
1261  char LiPo2s[] = " 2s LiPo, ";
1262  char LiPo3s[] = " 3s LiPo, ";
1263  char LiPo4s[] = " 4s LiPo, ";
1264  char LiPo5s[] = " 5s LiPo, ";
1265  char LiPo6s[] = " 6s LiPo, ";
1266  char PerCell[] = "V/C";
1267  char RXBattInfo[55];
1268  char RXBattNA[] = "(No data)";
1269  char RXBattNV[] = " ";
1270  char TXBattInfo[55];
1271  float ReadVolts = 0;
1272  float VoltsPerCell = 0;
1273  char BindButtonVisible[] = "vis bind,1";
1274 
1275 
1276  if (CurrentView == FrontView || CurrentView == DataView) {
1277  if (millis() - LastShowTime > 1000) {
1278  ShowNow = true;
1279  }
1280  }
1281  if (ShowNow)
1282  {
1283  LastShowTime = millis();
1284  if (USE_INA219) {
1285  txv = (ina219.getBusVoltage_V()) * 100;
1286 
1287  txpc = map(txv, 512, 670, 0, 100); // LiFePo4 Battery 2.6 ->3.5 volts per cell
1288  if (txpc < LOWBATTERY) {
1289  TXWarningFlag = true;
1290  }
1291  dtostrf(txpc, 0, 0, Vbuf);
1292  strcat(Vbuf, pc);
1293  if (CurrentView == FrontView) SendText(TXVolts, Vbuf);
1294  txv /= 100;
1295  dtostrf(txv, 1, 1, Vbuf);
1296  strcpy(TXBattInfo, Vbuf);
1297  strcat(TXBattInfo, v);
1298  txv /= 2;
1299  strcat(TXBattInfo, LiFe2s);
1300  dtostrf(txv, 2, 2, Vbuf);
1301  strcat(TXBattInfo, Vbuf);
1302  strcat(TXBattInfo, PerCell);
1303  if (CurrentView == FrontView) SendText(FrontView_TXBV, TXBattInfo);
1304  if (CurrentView == DataView) SendText(DataView_txv, TransmitterVersionNumber); // TX Version Number
1305  // if (CurrentView == DataView) SendText(DataView_txv, Vbuf);
1306  }
1307  if (!LostContactFlag) {
1308  if ((CurrentView == FrontView)) {
1309  if (!BoundFlag) {
1310  SendCommand(BindButtonVisible);
1311  BindButton=true;
1312  }
1313  else {
1314  SendText(FrontView_Connected, Msg_Connected);
1315  if (BoundFlag == true) {
1316  GreenLedOn();
1317  StartInactvityTimeout();
1318  }
1319  }
1320  }
1321 
1322  if (CurrentView == DataView) {
1323  SendValue(DataView_pps, PacketsPerSecond);
1324  SendValue(DataView_lps, LostPackets);
1325  SendText(DataView_Alt, ModelAltitude);
1326  SendText(DataView_MaxAlt, MaxAltitude);
1327  SendText(DataView_roll, ModelRoll);
1328  SendText(DataView_pitch, ModelPitch);
1329  SendText(DataView_yaw, ModelYaw);
1330  SendText(DataView_Rx,ThisRadio);
1331  SendText(DataView_rxv,ReceiverVersionNumber);
1332  SendValue(DataView_chav, BadChannelPointer);
1333  SendValue(DataView_Ls, GapLongest);
1334  SendValue(DataView_Ts, GapSum);
1335  SendValue(DataView_Sc, success);
1336  }
1337  ReadVolts = atof(ModelVolts) * 10;
1338  // 6s Max 25.2 -> 20.4
1339  // 5s Max 21.0 -> 17.0
1340  // 4s Max 16.8 -> 13.6
1341  // 3s Max 12.6 -> 10.2
1342  // 2s Max 8.4 -> 6.8
1343  if (RXCellCount == 6) Volts = map(ReadVolts, 204, 252, 0, 100); // works for 6s batteries (*10)
1344  if (RXCellCount == 5) Volts = map(ReadVolts, 170, 210, 0, 100); // works for 5s batteries (*10)
1345  if (RXCellCount == 4) Volts = map(ReadVolts, 136, 168, 0, 100); // works for 4s batteries (*10)
1346  if (RXCellCount == 3) Volts = map(ReadVolts, 102, 126, 0, 100); // works for 3s batteries (*10)
1347  if (RXCellCount == 2) Volts = map(ReadVolts, 68, 84, 0, 100); // works for 2s batteries (*10)
1348 
1349  if (VoltsDetected) {
1350  Volts = constrain(Volts, 0, 100);
1351  if (Volts <= LOWBATTERY && Volts > 0) {
1352  RXWarningFlag = true;
1353  }
1354  else {
1355  RXWarningFlag = false;
1356  }
1357  }
1358  if (VoltsDetected) {
1359  dtostrf(Volts, 0, 0, Vbuf);
1360  strcat(Vbuf, pc);
1361  if (BoundFlag && CurrentView == FrontView) SendText(FrontView_AckPayload, Vbuf);
1362  strcpy(RXBattInfo, ModelVolts);
1363  strcat(RXBattInfo, v);
1364  if (RXCellCount == 6) strcat(RXBattInfo, LiPo6s);
1365  if (RXCellCount == 5) strcat(RXBattInfo, LiPo5s);
1366  if (RXCellCount == 4) strcat(RXBattInfo, LiPo4s);
1367  if (RXCellCount == 3) strcat(RXBattInfo, LiPo3s);
1368  if (RXCellCount == 2) strcat(RXBattInfo, LiPo2s);
1369  VoltsPerCell = (ReadVolts / RXCellCount) / 10;
1370  dtostrf(VoltsPerCell, 2, 2, Vbuf);
1371  strcat(RXBattInfo, Vbuf);
1372  strcat(RXBattInfo, PerCell);
1373  if (BoundFlag && CurrentView == FrontView) SendText(FrontView_RXBV, RXBattInfo);
1374  }
1375  if (!VoltsDetected) {
1376  if (BoundFlag && CurrentView == FrontView) SendText(FrontView_RXBV, RXBattNA);
1377  if (BoundFlag && CurrentView == FrontView) SendText(FrontView_AckPayload, RXBattNV);
1378  }
1379  }
1380  else {
1381  if (BoundFlag) {
1382  if (CurrentView == DataView) {
1383  PacketsPerSecond = 0;
1384  SendValue(DataView_pps, PacketsPerSecond);
1385  SendValue(DataView_lps, LostPackets);
1386  }
1387 
1388  if (CurrentView == FrontView) {
1389  SendText(FrontView_Connected, Not_Connected);
1390  SendText(FrontView_RXBV, na); // data not available
1391  SendText(FrontView_AckPayload, na);
1392  }
1393  }
1394  else
1395  {
1396  if (CurrentView == FrontView)
1397  {
1398  SendText(FrontView_Connected, Not_Connected);
1399  }
1400  }
1401  }
1402  }
1403  if (CurrentView == FrontView) {
1404  if (RXWarningFlag || TXWarningFlag) {
1405  SendCommand(WarnNow);
1406  }
1407  if (!RXWarningFlag) {
1408  if (!TXWarningFlag) {
1409  SendCommand(WarnOff);
1410  }
1411  }
1412  }
1413 } // end ShowComms()
1414 
1415 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
1416 
1417 void FailedPacket()
1418 {
1419  int secondsRemaining;
1420  if (GapStart == 0) {
1421  GapStart = millis(); // To keep track of gaps' length
1422  }
1423  ++RecentPacketsLost;
1424  if (RecentPacketsLost > LOSTCONTACTCUTOFF) {
1425  ++RangeTestLostPackets;
1426  LostContactFlag = true;
1427  RedLedOn();
1428  ShowComms();
1429  }
1430  ++LostPackets;
1431  ShowComms();
1432  secondsRemaining = (Inactivity_Timeout / 1000) - (millis() - Inactivity_Start) / 1000;
1433  if (secondsRemaining <= 0) digitalWrite(POWER_OFF_PIN, HIGH); // INACTIVITY POWER OFF
1434 }
1435 
1436 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
1437 
1439 void SendCharArray(char* ch0, char* ch1, char* ch2, char* ch3, char* ch4, char* ch5, char* ch6, char* ch7, char* ch8, char* ch9, char* ch10, char* ch11, char* ch12)
1440 {
1441  strcpy(ch0, ch1);
1442  strcat(ch0, ch2);
1443  strcat(ch0, ch3);
1444  strcat(ch0, ch4);
1445  strcat(ch0, ch5);
1446  strcat(ch0, ch6);
1447  strcat(ch0, ch7);
1448  strcat(ch0, ch8);
1449  strcat(ch0, ch9);
1450  strcat(ch0, ch10);
1451  strcat(ch0, ch11);
1452  strcat(ch0, ch12);
1453  SendCommand(ch0);
1454 }
1455 
1456 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
1457 
1458 #define xx1 90 // was 75
1459 #define yy1 90 // Needed below... Edit xx1,yy1 to move box
1460 
1461 void DrawFhssBox()
1462 {
1463  int x1 = xx1;
1464  int y1 = yy1;
1465  int x2 = x1 + (128 * 5);
1466  int y2 = y1 + 255;
1467  int xd = 20; // half of 40 which is character width
1468  int xd1 = 24;
1469  char STR126[] = "\"127\"";
1470  char STR126GHZ[] = "\"2.527\"";
1471  char STR96[] = "\"96\"";
1472  char STR96GHZ[] = "\"2.496\"";
1473  char STR64[] = "\"64\"";
1474  char STR64GHZ[] = "\"2.464\"";
1475  char STR32[] = "\"32\"";
1476  char STR32GHZ[] = "\"2.432\"";
1477  char STR1[] = "\"0\"";
1478  char STR1GHZ[] = "\"2.400\"";
1479  char GHZ[] = "\"GHz:\"";
1480  char CH[] = "\"Ch:\"";
1481  char CB[150]; // COMMAND BUFFER
1482  char draw[] = "draw ";
1483  char xstr[] = "xstr ";
1484  char fyll[] = "fill ";
1485  char NB[12]; // Number Buffers
1486  char NB1[12];
1487  char NB2[12];
1488  char NB3[12];
1489  char NB4[12];
1490  char NB5[12];
1491  char NB6[12];
1492  char NB7[12];
1493  char NB8[12];
1494  char NA[1] = ""; // blank one
1495  char whyte[] = "WHITE";
1496  char whyte1[] = "WHITE,"; // ... with a comma
1497 
1498  SendCharArray(CB, draw, Str(NB1, x1, 1), Str(NB2, y1, 1), Str(NB3, x2, 1), Str(NB4, y2, 1), whyte, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA);
1499  SendCharArray(CB, xstr, Str(NB, x1 - xd, 1), Str(NB1, y2 + 4, 1), Str(NB2, 40, 1), Str(NB3, 25, 1), Str(NB4, 0, 1), whyte1, Str(NB5, 214, 1), Str(NB6, 1, 1), Str(NB7, 1, 1), Str(NB8, 1, 1), STR1);
1500  SendCharArray(CB, xstr, Str(NB, 30, 1), Str(NB1, y2 + 4, 1), Str(NB2, 40, 1), Str(NB3, 25, 1), Str(NB4, 0, 1), whyte1, Str(NB5, 214, 1), Str(NB6, 1, 1), Str(NB7, 1, 1), Str(NB8, 1, 1), CH);
1501  SendCharArray(CB, xstr, Str(NB, 16, 1), Str(NB1, y2 + 25, 1), Str(NB2, 50, 1), Str(NB3, 25, 1), Str(NB4, 0, 1), whyte1, Str(NB5, 214, 1), Str(NB6, 1, 1), Str(NB7, 1, 1), Str(NB8, 1, 1), GHZ);
1502  SendCharArray(CB, xstr, Str(NB, x1 - xd1, 1), Str(NB1, y2 + 25, 1), Str(NB2, 60, 1), Str(NB3, 25, 1), Str(NB4, 0, 1), whyte1, Str(NB5, 214, 1), Str(NB6, 1, 1), Str(NB7, 1, 1), Str(NB8, 1, 1), STR1GHZ);
1503  SendCharArray(CB, xstr, Str(NB, x1 + ((x2 - x1) / 4) - xd, 1), Str(NB1, y2 + 4, 1), Str(NB2, 40, 1), Str(NB3, 25, 1), Str(NB4, 0, 1), whyte1, Str(NB5, 214, 1), Str(NB6, 1, 1), Str(NB7, 1, 1), Str(NB8, 1, 1), STR32);
1504  SendCharArray(CB, xstr, Str(NB, (x1 + ((x2 - x1) / 4) - xd1), 1), Str(NB1, y2 + 25, 1), Str(NB2, 60, 1), Str(NB3, 25, 1), Str(NB4, 0, 1), whyte1, Str(NB5, 214, 1), Str(NB6, 1, 1), Str(NB7, 1, 1), Str(NB8, 1, 1), STR32GHZ);
1505  SendCharArray(CB, xstr, Str(NB, (x1 + ((x2 - x1) / 2) - xd), 1), Str(NB1, y2 + 4, 1), Str(NB2, 40, 1), Str(NB3, 25, 1), Str(NB4, 0, 1), whyte1, Str(NB5, 214, 1), Str(NB6, 1, 1), Str(NB7, 1, 1), Str(NB8, 1, 1), STR64);
1506  SendCharArray(CB, xstr, Str(NB, (x1 + ((x2 - x1) / 2) - xd1), 1), Str(NB1, y2 + 25, 1), Str(NB2, 60, 1), Str(NB3, 25, 1), Str(NB4, 0, 1), whyte1, Str(NB5, 214, 1), Str(NB6, 1, 1), Str(NB7, 1, 1), Str(NB8, 1, 1), STR64GHZ);
1507  SendCharArray(CB, xstr, Str(NB, (x1 + (((x2 - x1) / 4) * 3) - xd), 1), Str(NB1, y2 + 4, 1), Str(NB2, 40, 1), Str(NB3, 25, 1), Str(NB4, 0, 1), whyte1, Str(NB5, 214, 1), Str(NB6, 1, 1), Str(NB7, 1, 1), Str(NB8, 1, 1), STR96);
1508  SendCharArray(CB, xstr, Str(NB, (x1 + (((x2 - x1) / 4) * 3) - xd1), 1), Str(NB1, y2 + 25, 1), Str(NB2, 60, 1), Str(NB3, 25, 1), Str(NB4, 0, 1), whyte1, Str(NB5, 214, 1), Str(NB6, 1, 1), Str(NB7, 1, 1), Str(NB8, 1, 1), STR96GHZ);
1509  SendCharArray(CB, xstr, Str(NB, (x2 - xd), 1), Str(NB1, y2 + 4, 1), Str(NB2, 40, 1), Str(NB3, 25, 1), Str(NB4, 0, 1), whyte1, Str(NB5, 214, 1), Str(NB6, 1, 1), Str(NB7, 1, 1), Str(NB8, 1, 1), STR126);
1510  SendCharArray(CB, xstr, Str(NB, (x2 - xd1), 1), Str(NB1, y2 + 25, 1), Str(NB2, 60, 1), Str(NB3, 25, 1), Str(NB4, 0, 1), whyte1, Str(NB5, 214, 1), Str(NB6, 1, 1), Str(NB7, 1, 1), Str(NB8, 1, 1), STR126GHZ);
1511  SendCharArray(CB, fyll, Str(NB, (x1 + 1), 1), Str(NB1, (y1 + 1), 1), Str(NB2, ((128 * 5) - 2), 1), Str(NB3, 254, 1), Str(NB4, 214, 0), NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA);
1512 }
1513 
1514 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
1515 
1516 void SendMixValues()
1517 {
1518 
1519  char MixesView_Enabled[] = "MixesView.Enabled";
1520  char MixesView_FlightMode[] = "MixesView.FlightMode";
1521  char MixesView_MasterChannel[] = "MixesView.MasterChannel";
1522  char MixesView_SlaveChannel[] = "MixesView.SlaveChannel";
1523  char MixesView_Reversed[] = "MixesView.Reversed";
1524  char MixesView_Percent[] = "MixesView.Percent";
1525  char MixesView_h0[] = "MixesView.h0"; // =the slider control
1526  char MixesView_chM[] = "MixesView.chM";
1527  char MixesView_chS[] = "MixesView.chS";
1528 
1529  SendText(MixesView_chM, ChannelNames[Mixes[MixNumber][M_MasterChannel] - 1]);
1530  SendText(MixesView_chS, ChannelNames[Mixes[MixNumber][M_SlaveChannel] - 1]);
1531  SendValue(MixesView_Enabled, Mixes[MixNumber][M_Enabled]);
1532  SendValue(MixesView_FlightMode, Mixes[MixNumber][M_FlightMode]);
1533  if (Mixes[MixNumber][M_MasterChannel] == 0) Mixes[MixNumber][M_MasterChannel] = 1;
1534  SendValue(MixesView_MasterChannel, Mixes[MixNumber][M_MasterChannel]);
1535  if (Mixes[MixNumber][M_SlaveChannel] == 0) Mixes[MixNumber][M_SlaveChannel] = 1;
1536  SendValue(MixesView_SlaveChannel, Mixes[MixNumber][M_SlaveChannel]);
1537  SendValue(MixesView_Reversed, Mixes[MixNumber][M_Reversed]);
1538  if (Mixes[MixNumber][M_Percent] == 0) Mixes[MixNumber][M_Percent] = 100;
1539  if (Mixes[MixNumber][M_SlaveChannel] == Mixes[MixNumber][M_MasterChannel]) {
1540  Mixes[MixNumber][M_SlaveChannel]++;
1541  SendValue(MixesView_SlaveChannel, Mixes[MixNumber][M_SlaveChannel]);
1542  }
1543  SendValue(MixesView_Percent, Mixes[MixNumber][M_Percent]);
1544  SendValue(MixesView_h0, Mixes[MixNumber][M_Percent]);
1545 }
1546 
1547 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
1548 
1549 int GetNextNumber(int p1, char text1[CharsMax])
1550 {
1551  char text2[CharsMax];
1552  int j = 0;
1553  i = p1 - 1;
1554  j = 0;
1555  while (isDigit(text1[i]) && i < CharsMax) {
1556  text2[j] = text1[i];
1557  i++;
1558  j++;
1559  text2[j] = 0;
1560  }
1561  i = j; // = strlen only simpler
1562  if (i == 3) {
1563  j = (text2[0] - 48) * 100;
1564  j += (text2[1] - 48) * 10;
1565  j += (text2[2] - 48);
1566  }
1567  if (i == 2) {
1568  j = (text2[0] - 48) * 10;
1569  j += (text2[1] - 48);
1570  }
1571  if (i == 1) j = (text2[0] - 48);
1572  return j;
1573 }
1574 
1575 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
1576 
1577 short unsigned int GetStickInput(uint8_t l)
1578 {
1579  // This bit needs to be optimised but it works well enough.
1580  short unsigned int k = 0;
1581 
1582  if (l == 8) {
1583  if (Channel9SwitchValue == 0) k = mp(MinDegrees[FlightMode][8]);
1584  if (Channel9SwitchValue == 90) k = mp(CentreDegrees[FlightMode][8]);
1585  if (Channel9SwitchValue == 180) k = mp(MaxDegrees[FlightMode][8]);
1586  }
1587 
1588  if (l == 9) {
1589  if (Channel10SwitchValue == 0) k = mp(MinDegrees[FlightMode][9]);
1590  if (Channel10SwitchValue == 90) k = mp(CentreDegrees[FlightMode][9]);
1591  if (Channel10SwitchValue == 180) k = mp(MaxDegrees[FlightMode][9]);
1592  }
1593 
1594  if (l == 10) {
1595  if (Channel11SwitchValue == 0) k = mp(MinDegrees[FlightMode][10]);
1596  if (Channel11SwitchValue == 90) k = mp(CentreDegrees[FlightMode][10]);
1597  if (Channel11SwitchValue == 180) k = mp(MaxDegrees[FlightMode][10]);
1598  }
1599 
1600  if (l == 11) {
1601  if (Channel12SwitchValue == 0) k = mp(MinDegrees[FlightMode][11]);
1602  if (Channel12SwitchValue == 90) k = mp(CentreDegrees[FlightMode][11]);
1603  if (Channel12SwitchValue == 180) k = mp(MaxDegrees[FlightMode][11]);
1604  }
1605  if (l > 11) k = mp(CentreDegrees[FlightMode][InPutStick[l]]); // ??
1606  return k;
1607 }
1608 
1609 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
1610 // MIXES
1611 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
1612 
1613 void DoMixes()
1614 {
1615  int m, c, p, mindeg, maxdeg, TheSum, Result;
1616  for (m = 1; m <= MAXMIXES; m++) {
1617  if (Mixes[m][M_FlightMode] == FlightMode || Mixes[m][M_FlightMode] == 0) {
1618  if (Mixes[m][M_Enabled] == 1) {
1619  for (c = 0; c < CHANNELSUSED; c++) {
1620  if ((Mixes[m][M_MasterChannel] - 1) == c) {
1621  p = map(PreMixBuffer[c], MINMICROS, MAXMICROS, -HALFMICROSRANGE, HALFMICROSRANGE);
1622  p = p * Mixes[m][M_Percent] / 50; // ***** 50, not 100, because mix can now go right to 200% *****
1623  if (Mixes[m][M_Reversed] == 1) p = -p;
1624  TheSum = SendBuffer[(Mixes[m][M_SlaveChannel]) - 1] + p;
1625  mindeg = mp(MinDegrees[FlightMode][(Mixes[m][M_SlaveChannel]) - 1]);
1626  maxdeg = mp(MaxDegrees[FlightMode][(Mixes[m][M_SlaveChannel]) - 1]);
1627  if (mindeg > maxdeg) {
1628  Result = constrain(TheSum, maxdeg, mindeg);
1629  }
1630  else {
1631  Result = constrain(TheSum, mindeg, maxdeg);
1632  }
1633  SendBuffer[(Mixes[m][M_SlaveChannel]) - 1] = Result;
1634  }
1635  }
1636  }
1637  }
1638  }
1639 }
1640 
1641 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
1642 
1643 float MapExp(float xx, float Xxmin, float Xxmax, float Yymin, float Yymax, float Expo)
1644 {
1645  Expo = map(Expo, -100, 100, 0, 1);
1646  xx = pow(xx * xx, Expo);
1647  Xxmin = pow(Xxmin * Xxmin, Expo);
1648  Xxmax = pow(Xxmax * Xxmax, Expo);
1649  return map(xx, Xxmin, Xxmax, Yymin, Yymax);
1650 }
1651 
1652 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
1653 
1655 void get_new_channels_values()
1656 {
1657  short unsigned int k = 0, l = 0, m = 0, n = 0;
1658  for (n = 0; n < CHANNELSUSED; n++) {
1659  l = InPutStick[n]; // input sticks knobs & switches are now mapped by user
1660  if (l <= 7) m = analogRead(AnalogueInput[l]); // Get values from sticks' pots
1661  if (l > 7) { // Switch ?
1662  k = GetStickInput(l); // Four 3 postion switches
1663  }
1664  else { // Map the eight analogue inputs
1665  if (InterpolationTypes[FlightMode][n] == 0) { // Linear
1666  if (m >= ChannelMidHi[l]) k = map(m, ChannelMidHi[l], ChannelMax[l], mp(MidHiDegrees[FlightMode][n]), mp(MaxDegrees[FlightMode][n]));
1667  if (m >= ChannelCentre[l] && m <= (ChannelMidHi[l])) k = map(m, ChannelCentre[l], ChannelMidHi[l], mp(CentreDegrees[FlightMode][n]), mp(MidHiDegrees[FlightMode][n]));
1668  if (m >= ChannelMidLow[l] && m <= ChannelCentre[l]) k = map(m, ChannelMidLow[l], ChannelCentre[l], mp(MidLowDegrees[FlightMode][n]), mp(CentreDegrees[FlightMode][n]));
1669  if (m <= ChannelMidLow[l]) k = map(m, ChannelMin[l], ChannelMidLow[l], mp(MinDegrees[FlightMode][n]), mp(MidLowDegrees[FlightMode][n]));
1670  }
1671 
1672  if (InterpolationTypes[FlightMode][n] == 1) { // CatmullSpline (!)
1673  xPoints[0] = ChannelMin[l];
1674  xPoints[1] = ChannelMidLow[l];
1675  xPoints[2] = ChannelCentre[l];
1676  xPoints[3] = ChannelMidHi[l];
1677  xPoints[4] = ChannelMax[l];
1678  yPoints[4] = mp(MaxDegrees[FlightMode][n]);
1679  yPoints[3] = mp(MidHiDegrees[FlightMode][n]);
1680  yPoints[2] = mp(CentreDegrees[FlightMode][n]);
1681  yPoints[1] = mp(MidLowDegrees[FlightMode][n]);
1682  yPoints[0] = mp(MinDegrees[FlightMode][n]);
1683  k = Interpolation::CatmullSpline(xPoints, yPoints, PointsCount, m);
1684  }
1685  if (InterpolationTypes[FlightMode][n] == 2) { // EXPONENTIAL (!!)
1686  if (m >= ChannelCentre[l]) {
1687  k = MapExp(m - ChannelCentre[l], 0, ChannelMax[l] - ChannelCentre[l], 0, mp(MaxDegrees[FlightMode][n]) - mp(CentreDegrees[FlightMode][n]), Exponential[FlightMode][n]) + mp(CentreDegrees[FlightMode][n]);
1688  }
1689  if (m < ChannelCentre[l]) {
1690  k = MapExp(ChannelCentre[l] - m, 0, ChannelCentre[l] - ChannelMin[l], mp(CentreDegrees[FlightMode][n]) - mp(MinDegrees[FlightMode][n]), 0, Exponential[FlightMode][n]) + mp(MinDegrees[FlightMode][n]);
1691  }
1692  }
1693  }
1694  if (n < 4) {
1695  if (TrimsReversed[FlightMode][n] == 0) {
1696  k += (Trims[FlightMode][n] - 80); // TRIMS on lower four channels 80 is mid point (40 - 120)
1697  }
1698  else {
1699  k -= (Trims[FlightMode][n] - 80);
1700  }
1701  }
1702 
1703  if (!CalibratedYet) k = map(m, 0, 1024, MINMICROS, MAXMICROS); // Crude servos until calibrated
1704  PreMixBuffer[n] = constrain(k, MINMICROS, MAXMICROS);
1705  k = 1500;
1706  SendBuffer[n] = PreMixBuffer[n];
1707  }
1708  if (CurrentMode == NORMAL) DoMixes(); // not while calibrating
1709 }
1710 
1711 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
1712 
1713 void CalibrateSticks()
1714 {
1715  int j;
1716  for (i = 0; i < PROPOCHANNELS; i++)
1717  {
1718  j = analogRead(AnalogueInput[i]);
1719  if (ChannelMax[i] < j) ChannelMax[i] = j;
1720  if (ChannelMin[i] > j) ChannelMin[i] = j;
1721  }
1722  get_new_channels_values();
1723  ShowServoPos();
1724  SendCommand(NoSleeping); // no screen timeout while calibrating
1725 }
1726 
1727 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
1728 
1729 void CentreMaxMins()
1730 {
1731  for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; i++)
1732  {
1733  ChannelMax[i] = 512; // halfway up
1734  ChannelMin[i] = 512; // halfway down
1735  ChannelCentre[i] = 512;
1736  }
1737 }
1738 
1739 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
1740 
1741 void UpdateTrimView()
1742 {
1743  SendValue(TrimView_ch1, (Trims[FlightMode][0]));
1744  SendValue(TrimView_ch4, (Trims[FlightMode][1]));
1745  SendValue(TrimView_ch2, (Trims[FlightMode][2]));
1746  SendValue(TrimView_ch3, (Trims[FlightMode][3]));
1747 
1748  SendValue(TrimView_n1, (Trims[FlightMode][0] - 80));
1749  SendValue(TrimView_n4, (Trims[FlightMode][1] - 80));
1750  SendValue(TrimView_n2, (Trims[FlightMode][2] - 80));
1751  SendValue(TrimView_n3, (Trims[FlightMode][3] - 80));
1752 
1753  SendValue(TrimView_r1, TrimsReversed[FlightMode][0]);
1754  SendValue(TrimView_r4, TrimsReversed[FlightMode][1]);
1755  SendValue(TrimView_r2, TrimsReversed[FlightMode][2]);
1756  SendValue(TrimView_r3, TrimsReversed[FlightMode][3]);
1757 }
1758 
1759 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
1760 
1761 void ScanI2c()
1762 {
1763  int ii;
1764  USE_INA219 = false;
1765  for (ii = 1; ii < 127; ii++) {
1766  Wire.beginTransmission(ii);
1767  if (Wire.endTransmission() == 0) {
1768 #ifdef DB_SENSORS
1769  Serial.print(ii, HEX); // in case new one shows up
1770  Serial.print(" ");
1771  if (ii == 0x40) Serial.println("INA219 voltage meter detected!");
1772 #endif
1773  if (ii == 0x40) {
1774  USE_INA219 = true;
1775  }
1776  }
1777  }
1778 }
1779 
1780 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
1781 
1782 void CloseModelsFile()
1783 {
1784  if (ModelsFileOpen) {
1785  ModelsFileNumber.close();
1786  ModelsFileOpen = false;
1787  }
1788 }
1789 
1790 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
1791 
1792 void OpenModelsFile()
1793 {
1794  if (SingleModelFlag) {
1795  ModelsFileNumber = SD.open(SingleModelFile, FILE_WRITE);
1796  }
1797  else {
1798  ModelsFileNumber = SD.open(ModelsFile, FILE_WRITE);
1799  }
1800  if (ModelsFileNumber == 0) FileError = true;
1801  ModelsFileOpen = true;
1802 }
1803 
1804 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
1805 
1806 void UpdateGainsView()
1807 {
1808  SendValue(Rollp, rollp[FlightMode]);
1809  SendValue(Rolli, rolli[FlightMode]);
1810  SendValue(Rolld, rolld[FlightMode]);
1811  SendValue(Yawp, yawp[FlightMode]);
1812  SendValue(Yawi, yawi[FlightMode]);
1813  SendValue(Yawd, yawd[FlightMode]);
1814  SendValue(Rp, rollp[FlightMode]);
1815  SendValue(Ri, rolli[FlightMode]);
1816  SendValue(Rd, rolld[FlightMode]);
1817  SendValue(Yp, yawp[FlightMode]);
1818  SendValue(Yi, yawi[FlightMode]);
1819  SendValue(Yd, yawd[FlightMode]);
1820  SendValue(GainsViewFM, FlightMode);
1821  SendText(GainsViewMN, ModelName);
1822 }
1823 
1824 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
1825 
1826 void SDUpdateInt(int p_address, int p_value)
1827 {
1828  ModelsFileNumber.seek(p_address);
1829  ModelsFileNumber.write(uint8_t(p_value));
1830  ModelsFileNumber.write(uint8_t(p_value >> 8));
1831 }
1832 
1833 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
1834 
1835 void SDUpdateuint8_t(int p_address, uint8_t p_value)
1836 {
1837  ModelsFileNumber.seek(p_address);
1838  ModelsFileNumber.write(uint8_t(p_value));
1839 }
1840 
1841 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
1842 
1843 int SDReadInt(int p_address)
1844 {
1845  ModelsFileNumber.seek(p_address);
1846  int r = ModelsFileNumber.read();
1847  r += ModelsFileNumber.read() << 8;
1848  return r;
1849 }
1850 
1851 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
1852 
1853 uint8_t SDReaduint8_t(int p_address)
1854 {
1855  ModelsFileNumber.seek(p_address);
1856  uint8_t r = ModelsFileNumber.read();
1857  return r;
1858 }
1859 
1860 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
1861 
1862 void UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere()
1863 { // ... and flight mode ... and trim settings etc...
1864  char fm1[] = "Flight mode 1";
1865  char fm2[] = "Flight mode 2";
1866  char fm3[] = "Flight mode 3";
1867  char fm4[] = "Flight mode 4";
1868  char FrontView_ModelName[] = "ModelName";
1869  char SticksView_ModelName[] = "ModelName";
1870  char MixesView_ModelName[] = "ModelName";
1871  char ModelsView_ModelName[] = "ModelName";
1872  char GraphView_ModelName[] = "ModelName";
1873  char GraphView_Channel[] = "Channel";
1874  char TrimView_ModelName[] = "ModelName";
1875  char TrimView_FlightMode[] = "t1";
1876  char GraphView_fmode[] = "fmode";
1877  char SticksView_t1[] = "t1";
1878  char FrontView_fm1[] = "fm1";
1879  char FrontView_fm2[] = "fm2";
1880  char FrontView_fm3[] = "fm3";
1881  char FrontView_fm4[] = "fm4";
1882  char NoName[17];
1883  char Ch[] = "Channel ";
1884  char Nbuf[7];
1885 
1886  switch (CurrentView) {
1887  case FrontView:
1888  SendText(FrontView_ModelName, ModelName);
1889  break;
1890  case SticksView:
1891  SendText(SticksView_ModelName, ModelName);
1892  break;
1893  case MixesView:
1894  SendText(MixesView_ModelName, ModelName);
1895  break;
1896  case GraphView:
1897  SendText(GraphView_ModelName, ModelName);
1898  if (strlen(ChannelNames[ChanneltoSet - 1]) < 2) { // if no name, just show the channel number
1899  strcpy(NoName, Ch);
1900  SendText(GraphView_Channel, strcat(NoName, Str(Nbuf, ChanneltoSet, 0)));
1901  }
1902  else {
1903  SendText(GraphView_Channel, ChannelNames[ChanneltoSet - 1]);
1904  }
1905  break;
1906  case ModelsView:
1907  SendText(ModelsView_ModelName, ModelName);
1908  break;
1909  case Trim_View:
1910  SendText(TrimView_ModelName, ModelName);
1911  UpdateTrimView();
1912  break;
1913  default:
1914  break;
1915  }
1916 
1917  if (FlightMode == 1) {
1918  if (CurrentView == SticksView) SendText(SticksView_t1, fm1);
1919  if (CurrentView == GraphView) SendText(GraphView_fmode, fm1);
1920  if (CurrentView == Trim_View) {
1921  SendText(TrimView_FlightMode, fm1);
1922  UpdateTrimView();
1923  }
1924  if (CurrentView == FrontView) SendValue(FrontView_fm1, 1);
1925  if (CurrentView == GainsView) UpdateGainsView();
1926  }
1927  if (FlightMode == 2) {
1928  if (CurrentView == SticksView) SendText(SticksView_t1, fm2);
1929  if (CurrentView == GraphView) SendText(GraphView_fmode, fm2);
1930  if (CurrentView == Trim_View) {
1931  SendText(TrimView_FlightMode, fm2);
1932  UpdateTrimView();
1933  }
1934  if (CurrentView == FrontView) SendValue(FrontView_fm2, 1);
1935  if (CurrentView == GainsView) UpdateGainsView();
1936  }
1937  if (FlightMode == 3) {
1938  if (CurrentView == SticksView) SendText(SticksView_t1, fm3);
1939  if (CurrentView == GraphView) SendText(GraphView_fmode, fm3);
1940  if (CurrentView == Trim_View) {
1941  SendText(TrimView_FlightMode, fm3);
1942  UpdateTrimView();
1943  }
1944  if (CurrentView == FrontView) SendValue(FrontView_fm3, 1);
1945  if (CurrentView == GainsView) UpdateGainsView();
1946  }
1947  if (FlightMode == 4) {
1948  if (CurrentView == SticksView) SendText(SticksView_t1, fm4);
1949  if (CurrentView == GraphView) SendText(GraphView_fmode, fm4);
1950  if (CurrentView == Trim_View) {
1951  SendText(TrimView_FlightMode, fm4);
1952  UpdateTrimView();
1953  }
1954  if (CurrentView == FrontView) SendValue(FrontView_fm4, 1);
1955  if (CurrentView == GainsView) UpdateGainsView();
1956  }
1957 }
1958 
1959 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
1960 
1961 void InitSwitches()
1962 {
1963  for (i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
1964  pinMode(SwitchNumber[i], INPUT_PULLUP);
1965  }
1966 }
1967 
1968 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
1969 
1971 void InitMaxMin()
1972 {
1973  for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; i++) {
1974  ChannelMax[i] = 1024;
1975  ChannelMidHi[i] = 512 + 256;
1976  ChannelCentre[i] = 512;
1977  ChannelMidLow[i] = 256;
1978  ChannelMin[i] = 0;
1979  }
1980 }
1981 
1982 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
1983 
1984 void CentreTrims()
1985 {
1986  for (int j = 0; j <= FlightModesUsed; j++) {
1987  for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; i++) {
1988  Trims[j][i] = 80;
1989  }
1990  }
1991 }
1992 
1993 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
1994 
1995 void InitCentreDegrees()
1996 {
1997  int j;
1998  for (j = 1; j <= 4; j++) {
1999  for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; i++) {
2000  MaxDegrees[j][i] = 180; // 180 degrees
2001  MidHiDegrees[j][i] = 135;
2002  CentreDegrees[j][i] = 90; // 90 degrees
2003  MidLowDegrees[j][i] = 45;
2004  MinDegrees[j][i] = 0; // 0 degrees
2005  }
2006  }
2007 }
2008 
2009 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
2010 
2012 void ChannelCentres()
2013 {
2014  for (i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
2015  ChannelCentre[i] = analogRead(AnalogueInput[i]);
2016  ChannelMidHi[i] = ChannelCentre[i] + ((ChannelMax[i] - ChannelCentre[i]) / 2);
2017  ChannelMidLow[i] = ChannelMin[i] + ((ChannelCentre[i] - ChannelMin[i]) / 2);
2018  }
2019  get_new_channels_values();
2020  ShowServoPos();
2021 }
2022 
2023 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
2024 
2025 void UpdateButtonLabels()
2026 {
2027  char fsch1[] = "ch1";
2028  char fsch2[] = "ch2";
2029  char fsch3[] = "ch3";
2030  char fsch4[] = "ch4";
2031  char fsch5[] = "ch5";
2032  char fsch6[] = "ch6";
2033  char fsch7[] = "ch7";
2034  char fsch8[] = "ch8";
2035  char fsch9[] = "ch9";
2036  char fsch10[] = "ch10";
2037  char fsch11[] = "ch11";
2038  char fsch12[] = "ch12";
2039  char fsch13[] = "ch13";
2040  char fsch14[] = "ch14";
2041  char fsch15[] = "ch15";
2042  char fsch16[] = "ch16";
2043  char arrowrh[] = " >";
2044  char arrowlh[] = "< ";
2045  char BoxOffsetLabel[20];
2046  char SticksViewButton1[] = "Sch1";
2047  char SticksViewButton2[] = "Sch2";
2048  char SticksViewButton3[] = "Sch3";
2049  char SticksViewButton4[] = "Sch4";
2050  char SticksViewButton5[] = "Sch5";
2051  char SticksViewButton6[] = "Sch6";
2052  char SticksViewButton7[] = "Sch7";
2053  char SticksViewButton8[] = "Sch8";
2054  char SticksViewButton9[] = "Sch9";
2055  char SticksViewButton10[] = "Sch10";
2056  char SticksViewButton11[] = "Sch11";
2057  char SticksViewButton12[] = "Sch12";
2058  char SticksViewButton13[] = "Sch13";
2059  char SticksViewButton14[] = "Sch14";
2060  char SticksViewButton15[] = "Sch15";
2061  char SticksViewButton16[] = "Sch16";
2062  char one[] = " (1)";
2063  char two[] = "(2) ";
2064  char three[] = " (3)";
2065  char four[] = "(4) ";
2066  char five[] = " (5)";
2067  char six[] = "(6) ";
2068  char seven[] = " (7)";
2069  char eight[] = "(8) ";
2070  char nine[] = " (9)";
2071  char ten[] = "(10) ";
2072  char eleven[] = " (11)";
2073  char twelve[] = "(12) ";
2074  char thirteen[] = " (13)";
2075  char fourteen[] = "(14) ";
2076  char fifteen[] = " (15)";
2077  char sixteen[] = "(16) ";
2078  if (CurrentView == SticksView) {
2079  strcpy(BoxOffsetLabel, ChannelNames[0]);
2080  strcat(BoxOffsetLabel, one);
2081  strcat(BoxOffsetLabel, arrowrh);
2082  SendText(SticksViewButton1, BoxOffsetLabel);
2083  strcpy(BoxOffsetLabel, arrowlh);
2084  strcat(BoxOffsetLabel, two);
2085  strcat(BoxOffsetLabel, ChannelNames[1]);
2086  SendText(SticksViewButton2, BoxOffsetLabel);
2087  strcpy(BoxOffsetLabel, ChannelNames[2]);
2088  strcat(BoxOffsetLabel, three);
2089  strcat(BoxOffsetLabel, arrowrh);
2090  SendText(SticksViewButton3, BoxOffsetLabel);
2091  strcpy(BoxOffsetLabel, arrowlh);
2092  strcat(BoxOffsetLabel, four);
2093  strcat(BoxOffsetLabel, ChannelNames[3]);
2094  SendText(SticksViewButton4, BoxOffsetLabel);
2095  strcpy(BoxOffsetLabel, ChannelNames[4]);
2096  strcat(BoxOffsetLabel, five);
2097  strcat(BoxOffsetLabel, arrowrh);
2098  SendText(SticksViewButton5, BoxOffsetLabel);
2099  strcpy(BoxOffsetLabel, arrowlh);
2100  strcat(BoxOffsetLabel, six);
2101  strcat(BoxOffsetLabel, ChannelNames[5]);
2102  SendText(SticksViewButton6, BoxOffsetLabel);
2103  strcpy(BoxOffsetLabel, ChannelNames[6]);
2104  strcat(BoxOffsetLabel, seven);
2105  strcat(BoxOffsetLabel, arrowrh);
2106  SendText(SticksViewButton7, BoxOffsetLabel);
2107  strcpy(BoxOffsetLabel, arrowlh);
2108  strcat(BoxOffsetLabel, eight);
2109  strcat(BoxOffsetLabel, ChannelNames[7]);
2110  SendText(SticksViewButton8, BoxOffsetLabel);
2111  strcpy(BoxOffsetLabel, ChannelNames[8]);
2112  strcat(BoxOffsetLabel, nine);
2113  strcat(BoxOffsetLabel, arrowrh);
2114  SendText(SticksViewButton9, BoxOffsetLabel);
2115  strcpy(BoxOffsetLabel, arrowlh);
2116  strcat(BoxOffsetLabel, ten);
2117  strcat(BoxOffsetLabel, ChannelNames[9]);
2118  SendText(SticksViewButton10, BoxOffsetLabel);
2119  strcpy(BoxOffsetLabel, ChannelNames[10]);
2120  strcat(BoxOffsetLabel, eleven);
2121  strcat(BoxOffsetLabel, arrowrh);
2122  SendText(SticksViewButton11, BoxOffsetLabel);
2123  strcpy(BoxOffsetLabel, arrowlh);
2124  strcat(BoxOffsetLabel, twelve);
2125  strcat(BoxOffsetLabel, ChannelNames[11]);
2126  SendText(SticksViewButton12, BoxOffsetLabel);
2127  strcpy(BoxOffsetLabel, ChannelNames[12]);
2128  strcat(BoxOffsetLabel, thirteen);
2129  strcat(BoxOffsetLabel, arrowrh);
2130  SendText(SticksViewButton13, BoxOffsetLabel);
2131  strcpy(BoxOffsetLabel, arrowlh);
2132  strcat(BoxOffsetLabel, fourteen);
2133  strcat(BoxOffsetLabel, ChannelNames[13]);
2134  SendText(SticksViewButton14, BoxOffsetLabel);
2135  strcpy(BoxOffsetLabel, ChannelNames[14]);
2136  strcat(BoxOffsetLabel, fifteen);
2137  strcat(BoxOffsetLabel, arrowrh);
2138  SendText(SticksViewButton15, BoxOffsetLabel);
2139  strcpy(BoxOffsetLabel, arrowlh);
2140  strcat(BoxOffsetLabel, sixteen);
2141  strcat(BoxOffsetLabel, ChannelNames[15]);
2142  SendText(SticksViewButton16, BoxOffsetLabel);
2143  }
2144  if (CurrentView == Inputs_View) {
2145  SendText(fsch1, ChannelNames[0]);
2146  SendText(fsch2, ChannelNames[1]);
2147  SendText(fsch3, ChannelNames[2]);
2148  SendText(fsch4, ChannelNames[3]);
2149  SendText(fsch5, ChannelNames[4]);
2150  SendText(fsch6, ChannelNames[5]);
2151  SendText(fsch7, ChannelNames[6]);
2152  SendText(fsch8, ChannelNames[7]);
2153  SendText(fsch9, ChannelNames[8]);
2154  SendText(fsch10, ChannelNames[9]);
2155  SendText(fsch11, ChannelNames[10]);
2156  SendText(fsch12, ChannelNames[11]);
2157  SendText(fsch13, ChannelNames[12]);
2158  SendText(fsch14, ChannelNames[13]);
2159  SendText(fsch15, ChannelNames[14]);
2160  SendText(fsch16, ChannelNames[15]);
2161  }
2162 }
2163 
2164 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
2165 
2166 bool ReadOneModel(uint8_t Mnum)
2167 {
2168  unsigned int j;
2169  ModelDetected = true;
2170  if (!ModelsFileOpen) OpenModelsFile();
2171  addr = TXSIZE; // spare bytes for TX stuff
2172  addr += ((Mnum - 1) * MODELSIZE); // spare bytes for Model params
2173  StartLocation = addr;
2174  ModelDefined = SDReaduint8_t(addr); // this variable is redundant now could be re-used
2175  addr++;
2176  for (j = 0; j < 30; j++) {
2177  ModelName[j] = SDReaduint8_t(addr);
2178  addr++;
2179  }
2180 
2181  for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; i++) {
2182  for (j = 1; j <= 4; j++) {
2183  MaxDegrees[j][i] = SDReaduint8_t(addr);
2184  addr++;
2185  MidHiDegrees[j][i] = SDReaduint8_t(addr);
2186  addr++;
2187  CentreDegrees[j][i] = SDReaduint8_t(addr);
2188  addr++;
2189  MidLowDegrees[j][i] = SDReaduint8_t(addr);
2190  addr++;
2191  MinDegrees[j][i] = SDReaduint8_t(addr);
2192  addr++;
2193  }
2194  }
2195  for (j = 0; j < MAXMIXES; j++) {
2196  for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED + 1; i++) {
2197  Mixes[j][i] = SDReaduint8_t(addr); // Read mixes
2198  addr++;
2199  }
2200  }
2201 
2202  for (j = 0; j < FlightModesUsed + 1; j++) {
2203  for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED + 1; i++) {
2204  Trims[j][i] = SDReaduint8_t(addr);
2205  addr++;
2206  }
2207  }
2208  for (j = 0; j < FlightModesUsed + 1; j++) {
2209  for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED + 1; i++) {
2210  TrimsReversed[j][i] = SDReaduint8_t(addr);
2211  addr++;
2212  }
2213  }
2214  RXCellCount = SDReaduint8_t(addr);
2215  addr++;
2216 
2217  for (j = 0; j < FlightModesUsed + 1; j++) {
2218 
2219  rollp[j] = SDReaduint8_t(addr);
2220  addr++;
2221  rolli[j] = SDReaduint8_t(addr);
2222  addr++;
2223  rolld[j] = SDReaduint8_t(addr);
2224  addr++;
2225  yawp[j] = SDReaduint8_t(addr);
2226  addr++;
2227  yawi[j] = SDReaduint8_t(addr);
2228  addr++;
2229  yawd[j] = SDReaduint8_t(addr);
2230  addr++;
2231  }
2232  ModelType = SDReaduint8_t(addr);
2233  addr++;
2234  for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; i++) {
2235  InPutStick[i] = SDReaduint8_t(addr);
2236  if (InPutStick[i] > 16) InPutStick[i] = i; // reset if nothing was saved!
2237  addr++;
2238  }
2239 
2240  // **************************
2241 
2242  FMSwitch = SDReaduint8_t(addr);
2243  addr++;
2244  AutoSwitch = SDReaduint8_t(addr);
2245  addr++;
2246  Channel9Switch = SDReaduint8_t(addr);
2247  addr++;
2248  Channel10Switch = SDReaduint8_t(addr);
2249  addr++;
2250  Channel11Switch = SDReaduint8_t(addr);
2251  addr++;
2252  Channel12Switch = SDReaduint8_t(addr);
2253  addr++;
2254  Switch1Reversed = bool(SDReaduint8_t(addr));
2255  addr++;
2256  Switch2Reversed = bool(SDReaduint8_t(addr));
2257  addr++;
2258  Switch3Reversed = bool(SDReaduint8_t(addr));
2259  addr++;
2260  Switch4Reversed = bool(SDReaduint8_t(addr));
2261  addr++;
2262  for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; i++) {
2263  FailSafeChannel[i] = bool(SDReaduint8_t(addr));
2264  if (int(FailSafeChannel[i]) > 1) FailSafeChannel[i] = 0;
2265  addr++;
2266  }
2267  for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; i++) {
2268  for (j = 0; j < 10; j++) {
2269  ChannelNames[i][j] = SDReaduint8_t(addr);
2270  addr++;
2271  }
2272  }
2273 
2274  for (j = 0; j < FlightModesUsed + 1; j++) {
2275  for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED + 1; i++) {
2276  Exponential[j][i] = SDReaduint8_t(addr);
2277  if (Exponential[j][i] > 200 || Exponential[j][i] < 0) {
2278  Exponential[j][i] = 20;
2279  }
2280  addr++;
2281  }
2282  }
2283  for (j = 0; j < FlightModesUsed + 1; j++) {
2284  for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED + 1; i++) {
2285  InterpolationTypes[j][i] = SDReaduint8_t(addr);
2286  if (InterpolationTypes[j][i] < 0 || InterpolationTypes[j][i] > 2) {
2287  InterpolationTypes[j][i] = 2;
2288  }
2289  addr++;
2290  }
2291  }
2292 
2293  // **************************************
2294 
2295  if (ModelType == 0) ModelType = 1;
2296  OneModelMemory = addr - StartLocation;
2297 
2298 #ifdef DB_NEXTION
2299  Serial.print(txm);
2300  Serial.println(" bytes were used for TX data.");
2301  Serial.print(TXSIZE);
2302  Serial.println(" bytes had been reserved.");
2303  Serial.print("So ");
2304  Serial.print(TXSIZE - txm);
2305  Serial.println(" spare bytes still remain for TX params.");
2306  Serial.println(" ");
2307  Serial.print("Loaded model number: ");
2308  Serial.println(ModelNumber);
2309  Serial.print("Model name: ");
2310  Serial.println(ModelName);
2311  Serial.println(" ");
2312  Serial.print(OneModelMemory);
2313  Serial.println(" bytes used per model.");
2314  Serial.print(MODELSIZE - OneModelMemory);
2315  Serial.println(" spare bytes per model.");
2316  Serial.print(MODELSIZE);
2317  Serial.println(" bytes reserved per model.)");
2318 #endif // defined DB_NEXTION
2319  UpdateButtonLabels();
2320 
2321  return true;
2322 }
2323 
2324 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
2325 
2326 bool LoadAllParameters()
2327 {
2328  int p;
2329  int j = 0;
2330  if (!ModelsFileOpen) OpenModelsFile();
2331  addr = 0;
2332  p = SDReadInt(addr);
2333  if (p == RENEWDATA) {
2334  addr += 2;
2335  for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; i++) {
2336  ChannelMin[i] = SDReadInt(addr);
2337  addr += 2;
2338  ChannelMidLow[i] = SDReadInt(addr);
2339  addr += 2;
2340  ChannelCentre[i] = SDReadInt(addr);
2341  addr += 2;
2342  ChannelMidHi[i] = SDReadInt(addr);
2343  addr += 2;
2344  ChannelMax[i] = SDReadInt(addr);
2345  addr += 2;
2346  }
2347  FHSSTop = SDReaduint8_t(addr); // These are currently definable
2348  addr++;
2349  FHSSBottom = SDReaduint8_t(addr); // These are currently definable
2350  if (FHSSBottom < 1) FHSSBottom = 1;
2351  addr++;
2352  ModelNumber = SDReaduint8_t(addr);
2353  addr++;
2354  ScreenTimeout = SDReadInt(addr);
2355  addr++;
2356  addr++;
2357  Inactivity_Timeout = SDReaduint8_t(addr) * TICKSPERMINUTE;
2358 
2359  addr++;
2360  for (j = 0; j < 30; j++) {
2361  TxName[j] = SDReaduint8_t(addr);
2362  addr++;
2363  }
2364  txm = addr;
2365  ReadOneModel(ModelNumber);
2366  return true;
2367  }
2368  else {
2369  return false;
2370  }
2371 }
2372 
2373 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
2374 
2375 void Force_ReDisplay()
2376 {
2377  for (int i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; i++) ShownBuffer[i] = 242; // to force a re-show of servo positions
2378 }
2379 
2380 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
2381 
2382 void ButtonRed(char* but)
2383 {
2384  char lbut[60];
2385  char red[] = ".pco=RED";
2386  strcpy(lbut, but);
2387  strcat(lbut, red);
2388  SendCommand(lbut);
2389 }
2390 
2391 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
2392 
2393 void ButtonWhite(char* but)
2394 {
2395  char lbut[60];
2396  char wight[] = ".pco=WHITE";
2397  strcpy(lbut, but);
2398  strcat(lbut, wight);
2399  SendCommand(lbut);
2400 }
2401 
2402 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
2403 
2404 #ifdef USE_WATCHDOG
2405 void WatchDogCallBack()
2406 {
2407  // Serial.println("RESETTING ...");
2408 }
2409 #endif
2410 
2411 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
2412 
2413 void SetDS1307ToCompilerTime()
2414 {
2415  if (getDate(__DATE__) && getTime(__TIME__)) {
2416  RTC.write(tm);
2417  } // only useful when connected to compiler
2418 }
2419 
2420 /************************************************************************************************************/
2421 
2422 void GetTXVersionNumber()
2423 {
2424  char nbuf[5];
2425  uint8_t Txv1 = TXVERSION_MAJOR;
2426  uint8_t Txv2 = TXVERSION_MINOR;
2427  uint8_t Txv3 = TXVERSION_MINIMUS;
2428  Str(TransmitterVersionNumber, Txv1, 2);
2429  Str(nbuf, Txv2, 2);
2430  strcat(TransmitterVersionNumber, nbuf);
2431  Str(nbuf, Txv3, 0);
2432  strcat(TransmitterVersionNumber, nbuf);
2433 }
2434 
2435 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
2436 // SETUP
2437 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
2438 
2439 void setup()
2440 {
2441  char FrontView_Connected[] = "FrontView.Connected";
2442  char Initialising[] = "Initialising ... ";
2443  char Scanning[] = "Scanning ... ";
2444  char OptionsViewTXname[] = "OptionsView.TxName";
2445  Nextion.begin(115200); // BAUD rate also set in display code
2446 
2447  teensyMAC(MacAddress); // Get MAC address and use it as pipe address
2448  NewPipe = (uint64_t)MacAddress[0] << 40;
2449  NewPipe += (uint64_t)MacAddress[1] << 32;
2450  NewPipe += (uint64_t)MacAddress[2] << 24;
2451  NewPipe += (uint64_t)MacAddress[3] << 16;
2452  NewPipe += (uint64_t)MacAddress[4] << 8;
2453  NewPipe += (uint64_t)MacAddress[5];
2454 
2455  pinMode(REDLED, OUTPUT);
2456  pinMode(GREENLED, OUTPUT);
2457  pinMode(BLUELED, OUTPUT);
2458  pinMode(POWER_OFF_PIN, OUTPUT);
2459  BlueLedOn();
2460  SendText(FrontView_Connected, Scanning);
2461  Serial.begin(115200);
2462  Wire.begin();
2463  ScanI2c();
2464  if (USE_INA219) ina219.begin();
2465  SD.begin(chipSelect);
2466  InitRadio(DefaultPipe); // ***** Now in RadioFunctions file! *****
2467  InitSwitches();
2468  SendCommand(NextionWakeUp);
2469  InitMaxMin(); // in case not yet calibrated
2470  InitCentreDegrees(); // In case not yet calibrated
2471  CentreTrims();
2472  CalibratedYet = LoadAllParameters(); // If exists, read saved SD card settings.
2473  ReviseBadChannelMax();
2474  SendValue(ScreenViewTimeout, ScreenTimeout);
2475  SendCommand(page_FrontView); // Let's start at the beginning. Why not?
2476  PreScan(); // Do quiet scan while Nextion boots and Front View loads ...
2477  SendText(FrontView_Connected, Initialising);
2478  SendValue1(NextionSleepTime, ScreenTimeout); // Setup Screen timeout (No .val needed)
2479  SendCommand(NextionWakeOnTouch); // Wake on touch
2480  SendValue(FrontView_Hours, 0);
2481  SendValue(FrontView_Mins, 0);
2482  SendValue(FrontView_Secs, 0);
2483  UpdateGainsView();
2484  //SetDS1307ToCompilerTime(); // ** Uncomment this line to set DS1307 clock to compiler time. BUT then re-comment it!! Otherwise it will reset to same time on every boot up! **
2485  RecoveryTimer = millis();
2486  BoundFlag = false;
2487  TxOnTime = millis();
2488  UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
2489  SendText(OptionsViewTXname, TxName);
2490 #ifdef USE_WATCHDOG
2491  WatchDogConfig.window = WATCHDOGMAXRATE; // = MINIMUM RATE in milli seconds, (32ms to 522.232s) must be MUCH smaller than timeout
2492  WatchDogConfig.timeout = WATCHDOGTIMEOUT; // = MAX TIMEOUT in milli seconds, (32ms to 522.232s)
2493  WatchDogConfig.callback = WatchDogCallBack;
2494  TeensyWatchDog.begin(WatchDogConfig);
2495  LastDogKick = millis(); // needed? - yes!
2496 #endif
2497  StartInactvityTimeout();
2498  SizeOfCompressedData = sizeof(CompressedData);
2499  GetTXVersionNumber();
2500 
2501 }
2502 
2503 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
2504 
2505 void GetStatistics()
2506 {
2507  success = (float(RangeTestGoodPackets) / (float(RangeTestGoodPackets) + float(RangeTestLostPackets))) * 100;
2508  PacketsPerSecond = RangeTestGoodPackets;
2509  RangeTestGoodPackets = 0;
2510  RangeTestLostPackets = 0;
2511 }
2512 
2513 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
2514 
2516 int InStrng(char text1[CharsMax], char text2[CharsMax])
2517 {
2518  unsigned int j;
2519  unsigned int flag;
2520  for (j = 0; j < strlen(text2); j++) {
2521  flag = 0;
2522  for (i = 0; i < strlen(text1); i++) {
2523  if (text1[i] != text2[i + j]) flag = 1;
2524  }
2525  if (flag == 0) return j + 1;
2526  }
2527  return 0;
2528 }
2529 
2530 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
2531 
2532 void SaveTXStuff()
2533 {
2534  int rd = 0;
2535  bool EON = false;
2536  int j = 0;
2537 
2538  if (!ModelsFileOpen) OpenModelsFile();
2539  rd = RENEWDATA;
2540  addr = 0;
2541  CalibratedYet = true;
2542  SDUpdateInt(addr, rd); // xxxx in first two bytes = calibration done! *** CHANGE THIS NUMBER IF FORMAT IS NEW!! ****
2543  addr += 2;
2544  for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; i++) {
2545  SDUpdateInt(addr, ChannelMin[i]); // Stick min output of pot
2546  addr += 2;
2547  SDUpdateInt(addr, ChannelMidLow[i]); //
2548  addr += 2;
2549  SDUpdateInt(addr, ChannelCentre[i]); // Stick Centre output of pot
2550  addr += 2;
2551  SDUpdateInt(addr, ChannelMidHi[i]); //
2552  addr += 2;
2553  SDUpdateInt(addr, ChannelMax[i]); // Stick max output of pot
2554  addr += 2;
2555  }
2556  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, FHSSTop); // These are currently definable
2557  addr++;
2558  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, FHSSBottom); // These are currently definable
2559  addr++;
2560  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, ModelNumber);
2561  addr++;
2562  SDUpdateInt(addr, ScreenTimeout);
2563  addr++;
2564  addr++;
2565  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, (Inactivity_Timeout / TICKSPERMINUTE));
2566  addr++;
2567  for (j = 0; j < 30; j++) {
2568  if (EON) TxName[j] = 0;
2569  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, TxName[j]);
2570  if (TxName[j] == 0) EON = true;
2571  addr++;
2572  }
2573 
2574  CloseModelsFile();
2575 }
2576 
2577 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
2578 
2580 void SaveOneModel(int mnum)
2581 {
2582  bool EndOfName = false;
2583 
2584  if (!ModelsFileOpen) OpenModelsFile();
2585  unsigned int j;
2586  addr = TXSIZE; // spare bytes for TX stuff
2587  addr += (mnum - 1) * MODELSIZE; // spare bytes for Model params
2588  StartLocation = addr;
2589  ModelDefined = 42;
2590  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, ModelDefined);
2591  addr++;
2592  for (j = 0; j < 30; j++) {
2593  if (EndOfName) ModelName[j] = 0;
2594  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, ModelName[j]);
2595  if (ModelName[j] == 0) EndOfName = true;
2596  addr++;
2597  }
2598  for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; i++) {
2599  for (j = 1; j <= 4; j++) {
2600  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, MaxDegrees[j][i]); // Max requested in degrees (180)
2601  addr++;
2602  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, MidHiDegrees[j][i]); // MidHi requested in degrees (135)
2603  addr++;
2604  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, CentreDegrees[j][i]); // Centre requested in degrees (90)
2605  addr++;
2606  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, MidLowDegrees[j][i]); // MidLo requested in degrees (45)
2607  addr++;
2608  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, MinDegrees[j][i]); // Min requested in degrees (0)
2609  addr++;
2610  }
2611  }
2612  for (j = 0; j < MAXMIXES; j++) {
2613  for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED + 1; i++) {
2614  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, Mixes[j][i]); // Save mixes
2615  addr++;
2616  }
2617  }
2618  for (j = 0; j < FlightModesUsed + 1; j++) {
2619  for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED + 1; i++) {
2620  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, Trims[j][i]);
2621  addr++;
2622  }
2623  }
2624  for (j = 0; j < FlightModesUsed + 1; j++) {
2625  for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED + 1; i++) {
2626  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, TrimsReversed[j][i]);
2627  addr++;
2628  }
2629  }
2630  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, RXCellCount);
2631  addr++;
2632 
2633  for (j = 0; j < FlightModesUsed + 1; j++) {
2634  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, rollp[j]);
2635  addr++;
2636  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, rolli[j]);
2637  addr++;
2638  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, rolld[j]);
2639  addr++;
2640  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, yawp[j]);
2641  addr++;
2642  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, yawi[j]);
2643  addr++;
2644  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, yawd[j]);
2645  addr++;
2646  }
2647  if (ModelType == 0) ModelType = 1; // no zeros please
2648  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, ModelType);
2649  addr++;
2650  for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; i++) {
2651  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, InPutStick[i]);
2652  addr++;
2653  }
2654 
2655  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, FMSwitch);
2656  addr++;
2657  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, AutoSwitch);
2658  addr++;
2659  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, Channel9Switch);
2660  addr++;
2661  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, Channel10Switch);
2662  addr++;
2663  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, Channel11Switch);
2664  addr++;
2665  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, Channel12Switch);
2666  addr++;
2667  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, Switch1Reversed);
2668  addr++;
2669  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, Switch2Reversed);
2670  addr++;
2671  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, Switch3Reversed);
2672  addr++;
2673  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, Switch4Reversed);
2674  addr++;
2675  for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; i++) {
2676  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, FailSafeChannel[i]);
2677  addr++;
2678  }
2679  for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; i++) {
2680  for (j = 0; j < 10; j++) {
2681  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, ChannelNames[i][j]);
2682  addr++;
2683  }
2684  }
2685  for (j = 0; j < FlightModesUsed + 1; j++) {
2686  for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED + 1; i++) {
2687  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, Exponential[j][i]);
2688  addr++;
2689  }
2690  }
2691
