2692  for (j = 0; j < FlightModesUsed + 1; j++) {
2693  for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED + 1; i++) {
2694  SDUpdateuint8_t(addr, InterpolationTypes[j][i]);
2695  addr++;
2696  }
2697  }
2698  // **********************
2699 
2700  OneModelMemory = addr - StartLocation;
2701 #ifdef DB_NEXTION
2702  Serial.print("Saved model: ");
2703  Serial.println(ModelName);
2704  Serial.println(" ");
2705  Serial.print(OneModelMemory);
2706  Serial.println(" bytes used per model.");
2707  Serial.print(MODELSIZE - OneModelMemory);
2708  Serial.println(" spare bytes per model.");
2709  Serial.print(MODELSIZE);
2710  Serial.println(" bytes reserved per model.)");
2711  Serial.println(" ");
2712 #endif // defined DB_NEXTION
2713  CloseModelsFile();
2714 }
2715 
2716 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
2717 
2718 void ReadHelpFile(char* fname, char* htext)
2719 {
2720  char errormsg[] = "Help file was not found.";
2721  File fnumber;
2722  char a[] = " ";
2723 
2724  htext[0] = 0;
2725  i = 0;
2726  fnumber = SD.open(fname, FILE_READ);
2727  if (fnumber) {
2728  while (fnumber.available() && i < MAXFILELEN) {
2729  a[0] = fnumber.read();
2730  if (a[0] != 34) {
2731  strcat(htext, a);
2732  i++;
2733  }
2734  }
2735  }
2736  else {
2737  strcpy(htext, errormsg);
2738  }
2739  fnumber.close();
2740 }
2741 
2742 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
2743 
2744 void SendHelp()
2745 {
2746  char HelpView[] = "HelpView.HelpText";
2747  char HelpFile[20];
2748  char HelpText[MAXFILELEN + 10]; // MAX = 1200
2749  i = 9;
2750  int j = 0;
2751  while (WordsIn[i] != 0 && j < 19) {
2752  HelpFile[j] = WordsIn[i];
2753  i++;
2754  j++;
2755  HelpFile[j] = 0;
2756  }
2757  ReadHelpFile(HelpFile, HelpText);
2758  SendText1(HelpView, HelpText);
2759 }
2760 
2761 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
2762 
2764 int GetChannel()
2765 {
2766 
2767  for (i = 0; i < sizeof(WordsIn); i++) {
2768  if (isdigit(WordsIn[i])) break;
2769  }
2770  return atoi(&WordsIn[i]);
2771 }
2772 
2773 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
2774 
2775 void UpdateSwitchesDisplay()
2776 {
2777  char SwitchesView_sw1[] = "sw1";
2778  char SwitchesView_sw2[] = "sw2";
2779  char SwitchesView_sw3[] = "sw3";
2780  char SwitchesView_sw4[] = "sw4";
2781  char NotUsed[] = "Not used";
2782  char FlightModes123[] = "Flight modes 1 2 3";
2783  char Auto[] = "Auto (FM 4)";
2784  char Channel_9[] = "Channel 9";
2785  char Channel_10[] = "Channel 10";
2786  char Channel_11[] = "Channel 11";
2787  char Channel_12[] = "Channel 12";
2788 
2789  SendText(SwitchesView_sw1, NotUsed);
2790  if (AutoSwitch == 1) SendText(SwitchesView_sw1, Auto);
2791  if (FMSwitch == 1) SendText(SwitchesView_sw1, FlightModes123);
2792  if (Channel9Switch == 1) SendText(SwitchesView_sw1, Channel_9);
2793  if (Channel10Switch == 1) SendText(SwitchesView_sw1, Channel_10);
2794  if (Channel11Switch == 1) SendText(SwitchesView_sw1, Channel_11);
2795  if (Channel12Switch == 1) SendText(SwitchesView_sw1, Channel_12);
2796 
2797  SendText(SwitchesView_sw2, NotUsed);
2798  if (AutoSwitch == 2) SendText(SwitchesView_sw2, Auto);
2799  if (FMSwitch == 2) SendText(SwitchesView_sw2, FlightModes123);
2800  if (Channel9Switch == 2) SendText(SwitchesView_sw2, Channel_9);
2801  if (Channel10Switch == 2) SendText(SwitchesView_sw2, Channel_10);
2802  if (Channel11Switch == 2) SendText(SwitchesView_sw2, Channel_11);
2803  if (Channel12Switch == 2) SendText(SwitchesView_sw2, Channel_12);
2804 
2805  SendText(SwitchesView_sw3, NotUsed);
2806  if (AutoSwitch == 3) SendText(SwitchesView_sw3, Auto);
2807  if (FMSwitch == 3) SendText(SwitchesView_sw3, FlightModes123);
2808  if (Channel9Switch == 3) SendText(SwitchesView_sw3, Channel_9);
2809  if (Channel10Switch == 3) SendText(SwitchesView_sw3, Channel_10);
2810  if (Channel11Switch == 3) SendText(SwitchesView_sw3, Channel_11);
2811  if (Channel12Switch == 3) SendText(SwitchesView_sw3, Channel_12);
2812 
2813  SendText(SwitchesView_sw4, NotUsed);
2814  if (AutoSwitch == 4) SendText(SwitchesView_sw4, Auto);
2815  if (FMSwitch == 4) SendText(SwitchesView_sw4, FlightModes123);
2816  if (Channel9Switch == 4) SendText(SwitchesView_sw4, Channel_9);
2817  if (Channel10Switch == 4) SendText(SwitchesView_sw4, Channel_10);
2818  if (Channel11Switch == 4) SendText(SwitchesView_sw4, Channel_11);
2819  if (Channel12Switch == 4) SendText(SwitchesView_sw4, Channel_12);
2820 }
2821 
2822 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
2823 
2824 uint8_t CheckRange_0_16(uint8_t v)
2825 {
2826 
2827  if (v > 16) v = 16;
2828  if (v < 0) v = 0;
2829  return v;
2830 }
2831 
2832 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
2833 
2834 void DoNewChannelName(int ch, int k)
2835 {
2836  int j = 0;
2837  ChannelNames[ch - 1][0] = 32;
2838  ChannelNames[ch - 1][1] = 0; // remove old name
2839  while (uint8_t(WordsIn[k]) > 0) {
2840  ChannelNames[ch - 1][j] = WordsIn[k];
2841  j++;
2842  k++;
2843  ChannelNames[ch - 1][j] = 0;
2844  }
2845  SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
2846 }
2847 
2848 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
2849 
2851 void SortDirectory()
2852 {
2853  int f = 0;
2854  bool flag = true;
2855  int Scount = 0;
2856  char BoxOffset[18];
2857  while (flag && Scount < 10000) {
2858  flag = false;
2859  for (f = 0; f < ExportedFileCounter - 1; f++) {
2860  if (strcmp(TheFilesList[f], TheFilesList[f + 1]) > 0) {
2861  strcpy(BoxOffset, TheFilesList[f]);
2862  strcpy(TheFilesList[f], TheFilesList[f + 1]);
2863  strcpy(TheFilesList[f + 1], BoxOffset);
2864  flag = true;
2865  Scount++;
2866  }
2867  }
2868  }
2869 }
2870 
2871 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
2872 
2873 void BuildDirectory()
2874 {
2875  char MOD[] = ".MOD";
2876  char Entry1[20];
2877  char fn[18];
2878  File dir;
2879  dir = SD.open("/");
2880  ExportedFileCounter = 0;
2881  while (true) {
2882  File entry = dir.openNextFile();
2883  if (!entry || ExportedFileCounter > 18) break;
2884  strcpy(Entry1, entry.name());
2885  if (InStrng(MOD, Entry1) > 0) {
2886  strcpy(fn, entry.name());
2887  for (i = 0; i < 12; i++) {
2888  TheFilesList[ExportedFileCounter][i] = fn[i];
2889  }
2890  ExportedFileCounter++;
2891  }
2892  entry.close();
2893  }
2894  SortDirectory();
2895 }
2896 
2897 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
2898 
2900 void ShowFileNumber()
2901 {
2902  char ModelsView_filename[] = "filename";
2903  char newfname[17];
2904  if (FileNumberInView >= ExportedFileCounter) FileNumberInView = 0;
2905  if (FileNumberInView < 0) FileNumberInView = ExportedFileCounter - 1;
2906  for (i = 0; i < 12; i++) {
2907  newfname[i] = TheFilesList[FileNumberInView][i];
2908  newfname[i + 1] = 0;
2909  if (newfname[i] <= 32 || newfname[i] > 127) break;
2910  }
2911  SendText(ModelsView_filename, newfname);
2912 }
2913 
2914 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
2915 
2916 void ShowFileErrorMsg()
2917 {
2918  char ErrorOn[] = "vis error,1";
2919  char ErrorOff[] = "vis error,0";
2920  for (int pp = 0; pp < 3; pp++) {
2921  SendCommand(ErrorOn);
2922  delay(200);
2923  SendCommand(ErrorOff);
2924  delay(100);
2925  }
2926  FileError = false;
2927 }
2928 
2929 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
2930 
2931 void SaveAllParameters()
2932 {
2933  if (!ModelsFileOpen) OpenModelsFile();
2934  SaveTXStuff();
2935  txm = addr - 2;
2936  SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
2937 #ifdef DB_NEXTION
2938  Serial.println(" ");
2939  Serial.print(txm);
2940  Serial.println(" bytes written to SD CARD FOR TX.");
2941  Serial.print(TXSIZE);
2942  Serial.println(" bytes reserved for TX.");
2943  Serial.print(TXSIZE - txm);
2944  Serial.println(" Spare bytes still for any new TX params.");
2945  Serial.print("Saved model: ");
2946  Serial.print(ModelNumber);
2947  Serial.print(" (");
2948  Serial.print(ModelName);
2949  Serial.println(")");
2950 #endif // defined DB_NEXTION
2951 }
2952 
2953 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
2954 
2955 void ShowDirectory()
2956 {
2957  char filelistbuf[1024];
2958  char nul[] = "";
2959  char crlf[] = {13, 10, 0};
2960  char space[] = {' ', 0};
2961  char fileviewlist[] = "FilesView.list";
2962  char t[2] = "P";
2963  uint8_t n = 0;
2964  uint8_t nlp = 0;
2965  strcpy(filelistbuf, nul);
2966  for (i = 0; i < ExportedFileCounter; i++) {
2967  nlp = 13;
2968  for (int z = 0; z < 12; z++) {
2969  t[0] = TheFilesList[i][z];
2970  if (t[0] == 0) break;
2971  nlp--;
2972  strcat(filelistbuf, t);
2973  }
2974  n++;
2975  if (n > 2) {
2976  strcat(filelistbuf, crlf);
2977  n = 0;
2978  }
2979  else
2980  {
2981  for (int q = 0; q < nlp; q++) {
2982  strcat(filelistbuf, space);
2983  }
2984  }
2985  }
2986  SendText1(fileviewlist, filelistbuf);
2987 }
2988 
2989 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
2990 
2991 void SaveNewGains()
2992 {
2993  ButtonRed(SaveButton);
2994  ButtonRed(OKButton);
2995  rollp[FlightMode] = GetValue(Rollp);
2996  rolli[FlightMode] = GetValue(Rolli);
2997  rolld[FlightMode] = GetValue(Rolld);
2998  yawp[FlightMode] = GetValue(Yawp);
2999  yawi[FlightMode] = GetValue(Yawi);
3000  yawd[FlightMode] = GetValue(Yawd);
3001  SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
3002  ButtonWhite(SaveButton);
3003  ButtonWhite(OKButton);
3004 }
3005 
3006 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
3007 
3008 void SetDefaultValues()
3009 {
3010  int j;
3011  char ProgressStart[] = "vis Progress,1";
3012  char ProgressEnd[] = "vis Progress,0";
3013  char Progress[] = "Progress";
3014  char defaultName[] = "(Deleted)";
3015  char DefaultChannelNames[CHANNELSUSED][11] = {{"Aileron"}, {"Elevator"}, {"Throttle"}, {"Rudder"}, {"Ch 5"}, {"Ch 6"}, {"Ch 7"}, {"Ch 8"}, {"Ch 9"}, {"Ch 10"}, {"Ch 11"}, {"Ch 12"}, {"Ch 13"}, {"Ch 14"}, {"Ch 15"}, {"Ch 16"}};
3016  SendCommand(ProgressStart);
3017  SendValue(Progress, 5);
3018  delay(10);
3019  strcpy(ModelName, defaultName);
3020 
3021  for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; i++) {
3022  for (j = 1; j <= 4; j++) {
3023  if (i == 1) {
3024  MaxDegrees[j][i] = 30; // Elevator goes the other way by default
3025  MidHiDegrees[j][i] = 60;
3026  CentreDegrees[j][i] = 90;
3027  MidLowDegrees[j][i] = 120;
3028  MinDegrees[j][i] = 150;
3029  }
3030  else {
3031  MaxDegrees[j][i] = 150;
3032  MidHiDegrees[j][i] = 120;
3033  CentreDegrees[j][i] = 90;
3034  MidLowDegrees[j][i] = 60;
3035  MinDegrees[j][i] = 30;
3036  }
3037  }
3038  }
3039  SendValue(Progress, 15);
3040  delay(10);
3041  for (j = 0; j < MAXMIXES; j++) {
3042  for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; i++) {
3043  Mixes[j][i] = 0;
3044  }
3045  }
3046  SendValue(Progress, 25);
3047  delay(10);
3048 
3049  for (j = 0; j < FlightModesUsed + 1; j++) { // must have fudged this somewhere.... 5?!
3050  for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; i++) {
3051  Trims[j][i] = 80; // MIDPOINT is 80 !
3052  TrimsReversed[j][i] = 0;
3053  }
3054  }
3055  RXCellCount = 3;
3056  for (j = 0; j < FlightModesUsed + 1; j++) {
3057  rollp[j] = 0;
3058  rolli[j] = 0;
3059  rolld[j] = 0;
3060  yawp[j] = 0;
3061  yawi[j] = 0;
3062  yawd[j] = 0;
3063  }
3064  SendValue(Progress, 45);
3065  delay(10);
3066  ModelType = 1;
3067  for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; i++) {
3068  InPutStick[i] = i;
3069  }
3070  FMSwitch = 4;
3071  AutoSwitch = 1;
3072  Channel9Switch = 2;
3073  Channel10Switch = 3;
3074  Channel11Switch = 0;
3075  Channel12Switch = 0;
3076  Switch1Reversed = false;
3077  Switch2Reversed = false;
3078  Switch3Reversed = false;
3079  Switch4Reversed = false;
3080  SendValue(Progress, 65);
3081  delay(10);
3082  for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; i++) {
3083  FailSafeChannel[i] = false;
3084  }
3085  SendValue(Progress, 75);
3086  delay(10);
3087  for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED; i++) {
3088  for (j = 0; j < 10; j++) {
3089  ChannelNames[i][j] = DefaultChannelNames[i][j];
3090  addr++;
3091  }
3092  }
3093 
3094  for (j = 0; j < FlightModesUsed + 1; j++) {
3095  for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED + 1; i++) {
3096  Exponential[j][i] = 0; // 20% expo = default
3097  addr++;
3098  }
3099  }
3100  for (j = 0; j < FlightModesUsed + 1; j++) {
3101  for (i = 0; i < CHANNELSUSED + 1; i++) {
3102  InterpolationTypes[j][i] = 2; // Expo is default
3103  addr++;
3104  }
3105  }
3106 
3107  SendValue(Progress, 95);
3108  delay(10);
3109  SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
3110  UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
3111  SendValue(Progress, 100);
3112  delay(200);
3113  SendCommand(ProgressEnd);
3114 }
3115 
3116 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
3117 
3118 void ClearBox()
3119 {
3120  char fillcmd[] = "fill 30,30,380,365,214";
3121  SendCommand(fillcmd);
3122 }
3123 
3124 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
3125 
3133 void DrawLine(int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2, int c)
3134 {
3135  char line[] = "line ";
3136  char nb[12];
3137  char cb[50];
3138  char comma[] = ",";
3139  strcpy(cb, line);
3140  strcat(cb, Str(nb, x1, 0));
3141  strcat(cb, comma);
3142  strcat(cb, Str(nb, y1, 0));
3143  strcat(cb, comma);
3144  strcat(cb, Str(nb, x2, 0));
3145  strcat(cb, comma);
3146  strcat(cb, Str(nb, y2, 0));
3147  strcat(cb, comma);
3148  strcat(cb, Str(nb, c, 0));
3149  SendCommand(cb);
3150 }
3151 
3152 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
3153 
3161 void DrawBox(int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2, int c)
3162 {
3163  char line[] = "draw ";
3164  char nb[12];
3165  char cb[50];
3166  char comma[] = ",";
3167  strcpy(cb, line);
3168  strcat(cb, Str(nb, x1, 0));
3169  strcat(cb, comma);
3170  strcat(cb, Str(nb, y1, 0));
3171  strcat(cb, comma);
3172  strcat(cb, Str(nb, x2, 0));
3173  strcat(cb, comma);
3174  strcat(cb, Str(nb, y2, 0));
3175  strcat(cb, comma);
3176  strcat(cb, Str(nb, c, 0));
3177  SendCommand(cb);
3178 }
3179 
3180 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
3181 
3183 void GetDotPositions()
3184 {
3185  int p = 0;
3186  BoxOffset = 35;
3187  BoxLeft = BoxOffset;
3188  BoxTop = BoxOffset;
3189  BoxRight = BoxLeft + 395;
3190  BoxBottom = BoxRight;
3191  xPoints[0] = BoxLeft;
3192  xPoints[4] = BoxRight - BoxOffset;
3193 
3194  p = map(MinDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1], 0, 180, BoxSize, BoxOffset);
3195  yPoints[0] = constrain(p, 39, 391);
3196  p = map(MidLowDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1], 0, 180, BoxSize, BoxOffset);
3197  yPoints[1] = constrain(p, 39, 391);
3198  xPoints[1] = BoxOffset + 90;
3199  xPoints[2] = BoxOffset + 180;
3200  p = map(CentreDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1], 0, 180, BoxSize, BoxOffset);
3201  yPoints[2] = constrain(p, 39, 391);
3202  xPoints[3] = BoxOffset + 270;
3203  p = map(MidHiDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1], 0, 180, BoxSize, BoxOffset);
3204  yPoints[3] = constrain(p, 39, 391);
3205  p = map(MaxDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1], 0, 180, BoxSize, BoxOffset);
3206  yPoints[4] = constrain(p, 39, 391);
3207 }
3208 
3209 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
3210 
3211 int DegsToPercent(int degs)
3212 {
3213  return map(degs, 0, 180, -100, 100);
3214 }
3215 
3216 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
3217 
3218 void DrawDot(int xx, int yy, int rad, int colr)
3219 {
3220  char cirs[] = "cirs ";
3221  char nb[12];
3222  char cb[50];
3223  char comma[] = ",";
3224  strcpy(cb, cirs);
3225  strcat(cb, Str(nb, xx, 0));
3226  strcat(cb, comma);
3227  strcat(cb, Str(nb, yy, 0));
3228  strcat(cb, comma);
3229  strcat(cb, Str(nb, rad, 0));
3230  strcat(cb, comma);
3231  strcat(cb, Str(nb, colr, 0));
3232  SendCommand(cb);
3233 }
3234 
3235 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
3236 
3237 void updateInterpolationTypes()
3238 {
3239  char ExpR[] = "Exp";
3240  char Smooth[] = "Smooth";
3241  char Lines[] = "Lines";
3242  char Expon[] = "Expo"; // number display
3243  char Ex1[] = "Ex1"; // slider
3244  char t3on[] = "vis t3,1"; // expo value lable
3245  char b13on[] = "vis b13,1"; // expo -
3246  char b12on[] = "vis b12,1"; // expo +
3247  char ExponOn[] = "vis Expo,1"; // number display
3248  char Ex1On[] = "vis Ex1,1"; // slider
3249  char t3off[] = "vis t3,0"; // expo value lable
3250  char b13off[] = "vis b13,0"; // expo -
3251  char b12off[] = "vis b12,0"; // expo +
3252  char ExponOff[] = "vis Expo,0"; // number display
3253  char Ex1Off[] = "vis Ex1,0"; // slider
3254 
3255  switch (InterpolationTypes[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1]) {
3256  case 0:
3257  SendValue(Lines, 1);
3258  SendValue(Smooth, 0);
3259  SendValue(ExpR, 0);
3260  SendCommand(t3off);
3261  SendCommand(b13off);
3262  SendCommand(b12off);
3263  SendCommand(ExponOff);
3264  SendCommand(Ex1Off);
3265  break;
3266  case 1:
3267  SendValue(Lines, 0);
3268  SendValue(Smooth, 1);
3269  SendValue(ExpR, 0);
3270  SendCommand(t3off);
3271  SendCommand(b13off);
3272  SendCommand(b12off);
3273  SendCommand(ExponOff);
3274  SendCommand(Ex1Off);
3275  break;
3276  case 2:
3277  SendValue(Lines, 0);
3278  SendValue(Smooth, 0);
3279  SendValue(ExpR, 1);
3280  SendCommand(t3on);
3281  SendCommand(b13on);
3282  SendCommand(b12on);
3283  SendCommand(ExponOn);
3284  SendCommand(Ex1On);
3285  SendValue(Ex1, Exponential[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1]);
3286  SendValue(Expon, Exponential[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1]);
3287  break;
3288  default:
3289  break;
3290  }
3291 }
3292 
3293 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
3294 
3295 void DisplayCurve()
3296 {
3297  int p = 0;
3298  char Gn1[] = "n1";
3299  char Gn2[] = "n2";
3300  char Gn3[] = "n3";
3301  char Gn4[] = "n4";
3302  char Gn5[] = "n5";
3303  char b3on[] = "vis b3,1";
3304  char b4on[] = "vis b4,1";
3305  char b7on[] = "vis b7,1";
3306  char b8on[] = "vis b8,1";
3307  char n2on[] = "vis n2,1";
3308  char n4on[] = "vis n4,1";
3309  char b3off[] = "vis b3,0";
3310  char b4off[] = "vis b4,0";
3311  char b7off[] = "vis b7,0";
3312  char b8off[] = "vis b8,0";
3313  char n2off[] = "vis n2,0";
3314  char n4off[] = "vis n4,0";
3315 
3316  int Step = 8;
3317  float HalfXRange;
3318  float TopHalfYRange;
3319  float BottomHalfYRange;
3320  int xDot1;
3321  int yDot1;
3322  int xDot2 = 0;
3323  int yDot2 = 0;
3324  int DotSize = 2;
3325  int DotColour = Yellow;
3326  ClearBox();
3327  p = constrain(MinDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1], 0, 180);
3328  MinDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] = p;
3329  p = constrain(MidLowDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1], 0, 180);
3330  MidLowDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] = p;
3331  p = constrain(CentreDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1], 0, 180);
3332  CentreDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] = p;
3333  p = constrain(MidHiDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1], 0, 180);
3334  MidHiDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] = p;
3335  p = constrain(MaxDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1], 0, 180);
3336  MaxDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] = p;
3337  GetDotPositions();
3338  SendValue(Gn1, DegsToPercent(MinDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1])); // put numbers at top row
3339  SendValue(Gn2, DegsToPercent(MidLowDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1]));
3340  SendValue(Gn3, DegsToPercent(CentreDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1]));
3341  SendValue(Gn4, DegsToPercent(MidHiDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1]));
3342  SendValue(Gn5, DegsToPercent(MaxDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1]));
3343  DrawBox(BoxLeft, BoxTop, BoxRight - BoxLeft, BoxBottom - BoxTop, Green);
3344 
3345  xDot1 = xPoints[0];
3346  yDot1 = ((BoxBottom - BoxTop) / 2) + 20; // ?
3347  xDot2 = BoxRight - BoxOffset;
3348  yDot2 = yDot1;
3349  DrawLine(xDot1, yDot1, xDot2, yDot1, Red);
3350 
3351  xDot1 = xPoints[2];
3352  yDot1 = BoxTop;
3353  xDot2 = xDot1;
3354  yDot2 = BoxBottom - BoxOffset;
3355  DrawLine(xDot1, yDot1, xDot2, yDot2, Red);
3356 
3357  if (InterpolationTypes[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] == 0) {
3358  SendCommand(b3on);
3359  SendCommand(b4on);
3360  SendCommand(b7on);
3361  SendCommand(b8on);
3362  SendCommand(n2on);
3363  SendCommand(n4on);
3364  DrawLine(xPoints[0], yPoints[0], xPoints[1], yPoints[1], White); // this adds the straight version of the curve
3365  DrawLine(xPoints[1], yPoints[1], xPoints[2], yPoints[2], White);
3366  DrawLine(xPoints[2], yPoints[2], xPoints[3], yPoints[3], White);
3367  DrawLine(xPoints[3], yPoints[3], xPoints[4], yPoints[4], White);
3368  }
3369  delay(250);
3370  if (InterpolationTypes[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] == 1) {
3371  SendCommand(b3on);
3372  SendCommand(b4on);
3373  SendCommand(b7on);
3374  SendCommand(b8on);
3375  SendCommand(n2on);
3376  SendCommand(n4on);
3377  yDot2 = 0;
3378  for (xPoint = xPoints[0]; xPoint <= xPoints[4]; xPoint += Step) {
3379  if (Step > xPoints[4] - xPoint) {
3380  Step = xPoints[4] - xPoint;
3381  }
3382  if (Step < 1) Step = 1;
3383  yPoint = Interpolation::CatmullSpline(xPoints, yPoints, PointsCount, xPoint);
3384  xDot1 = xPoint;
3385  yDot1 = yPoint;
3386  if (yDot2 == 0) {
3387  xDot2 = xDot1;
3388  yDot2 = yDot1;
3389  }
3390  DrawLine(xDot1, yDot1, xDot2, yDot2, White);
3391  xDot2 = xDot1;
3392  yDot2 = yDot1;
3393  }
3394  }
3395 
3396  if (InterpolationTypes[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] == 2) { //EXPO ************************************************************************************************
3397  #define APPROXIMATION 3 // This is for the approximation of the screen curve
3398 
3399  SendCommand(b3off);
3400  SendCommand(b4off);
3401  SendCommand(b7off);
3402  SendCommand(b8off);
3403  SendCommand(n2off);
3404  SendCommand(n4off);
3405  HalfXRange = xPoints[4] - xPoints[2];
3406  TopHalfYRange = yPoints[4] - yPoints[2];
3407  BottomHalfYRange = yPoints[2] - yPoints[0];
3408  yDot2 = 0;
3409  Step = APPROXIMATION; // This is the approximation of the screen curve
3410  for (xPoint = 0; xPoint <= HalfXRange; xPoint += Step) { // Simulate a curve with many short lines to speed it up
3411  yPoint = MapExp(HalfXRange - xPoint, HalfXRange, 0, 0, BottomHalfYRange, Exponential[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1]);
3412  if (Step > HalfXRange - xPoint) {
3413  Step = HalfXRange - xPoint;
3414  }
3415  if (Step < 1) Step = 1;
3416  yDot1 = yPoint + yPoints[0];
3417  xDot1 = xPoint + xPoints[0];
3418  if (yDot2 == 0) {
3419  xDot2 = xDot1;
3420  yDot2 = yDot1;
3421  }
3422  DrawLine(xDot1, yDot1, xDot2, yDot2, White); // Draw short line from this point to previous point
3423  xDot2 = xDot1;
3424  yDot2 = yDot1;
3425  }
3426  Step = APPROXIMATION;
3427  yDot2 = 0;
3428  // for (xPoint = 0; xPoint <= HalfXRange; xPoint += Step) { // Simulate a curve with many short lines to speed it up
3429  for (xPoint = HalfXRange; xPoint >= 0; xPoint -= Step) { // Simulate a curve with many short lines to speed it up
3430 
3431 
3432  yPoint = MapExp(xPoint, 0, HalfXRange, 0, TopHalfYRange, Exponential[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1]);
3433  if (Step > xPoint) {
3434  Step = xPoint;
3435  }
3436  if (Step < 1) Step = 1;
3437  yDot1 = yPoint + yPoints[2];
3438  xDot1 = xPoint + xPoints[2];
3439  if (yDot2 == 0) {
3440  xDot2 = xDot1;
3441  yDot2 = yDot1;
3442  }
3443  DrawLine(xDot1, yDot1, xDot2, yDot2, White); // Draw short line from this point to previous point
3444  xDot2 = xDot1;
3445  yDot2 = yDot1;
3446  }
3447  DrawDot(xPoints[0], yPoints[0], DotSize, DotColour); // This adds 3 dots
3448  DrawDot(xPoints[2], yPoints[2], DotSize, DotColour);
3449  DrawDot(xPoints[4], yPoints[4], DotSize, DotColour);
3450  }
3451 
3452  if (InterpolationTypes[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] != 2) {
3453  DrawDot(xPoints[0], yPoints[0], DotSize, DotColour); // This adds 5 dots
3454  DrawDot(xPoints[1], yPoints[1], DotSize, DotColour);
3455  DrawDot(xPoints[2], yPoints[2], DotSize, DotColour);
3456  DrawDot(xPoints[3], yPoints[3], DotSize, DotColour);
3457  DrawDot(xPoints[4], yPoints[4], DotSize, DotColour);
3458  }
3459  updateInterpolationTypes();
3460 }
3461 
3462 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
3463 
3464 void BindNow()
3465 {
3466 
3467 #ifdef DB_BIND
3468  Serial.println("Binding");
3469 #endif
3470  BindingNow = 1;
3471  ModelDetected = true; // just to stop auto model switching
3472 }
3473 
3474 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
3475 
3476 int GetDifference(int YtouchPlace, int oldy)
3477 {
3478  int dd;
3479  dd = (YtouchPlace - oldy) / 2;
3480  if (dd < 0) dd = -dd;
3481  return dd;
3482 }
3483 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
3484 
3486 void MovePoint()
3487 {
3488  int rjump = 0;
3489  GetDotPositions(); // current
3490  if (XtouchPlace > BoxRight - BoxOffset) return; // out of range
3491  if (XtouchPlace < BoxOffset) return; // out of range
3492  if (YtouchPlace < BoxTop) return; // out of range
3493  if (YtouchPlace > BoxBottom - BoxOffset) return; // out of range
3494 
3495  if (XtouchPlace < BoxOffset + xPoints[0]) { // do leftmost point ?
3496  rjump = GetDifference(YtouchPlace, yPoints[0]);
3497  if (YtouchPlace > yPoints[0]) {
3498  if (MinDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] >= rjump) MinDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] -= rjump;
3499  }
3500  else {
3501  if (MinDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] <= (180 - rjump)) MinDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] += rjump;
3502  }
3503  }
3504 
3505  if (XtouchPlace > xPoints[1] - BoxOffset && XtouchPlace < xPoints[1] + BoxOffset) { // do next point ?
3506  if (InterpolationTypes[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] == 2) return; // expo = ignore this area
3507  rjump = GetDifference(YtouchPlace, yPoints[1]);
3508  if (YtouchPlace > yPoints[1]) {
3509  if (MidLowDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] >= rjump) MidLowDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] -= rjump;
3510  }
3511  else {
3512  if (MidLowDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] <= 180 - rjump) MidLowDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] += rjump;
3513  }
3514  }
3515 
3516  if (XtouchPlace > xPoints[2] - BoxOffset && XtouchPlace < xPoints[2] + BoxOffset) { // do next point ?
3517  rjump = GetDifference(YtouchPlace, yPoints[2]);
3518  if (YtouchPlace > yPoints[2]) {
3519  if (CentreDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] >= rjump) CentreDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] -= rjump;
3520  }
3521  else {
3522  if (CentreDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] <= 180 - rjump) CentreDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] += rjump;
3523  }
3524  }
3525 
3526  if (XtouchPlace > xPoints[3] - BoxOffset && XtouchPlace < xPoints[3] + BoxOffset) { // do next point ?
3527  if (InterpolationTypes[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] == 2) return; // expo = ignore this area
3528  rjump = GetDifference(YtouchPlace, yPoints[3]);
3529  if (YtouchPlace > yPoints[3]) {
3530  if (MidHiDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] >= rjump) MidHiDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] -= rjump;
3531  }
3532  else {
3533  if (MidHiDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] <= 180 - rjump) MidHiDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] += rjump;
3534  }
3535  }
3536  if (XtouchPlace > xPoints[3] + BoxOffset) // do hi point ?
3537  {
3538  rjump = GetDifference(YtouchPlace, yPoints[4]);
3539  if (YtouchPlace > yPoints[4]) {
3540  if (MaxDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] > rjump) MaxDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] -= rjump;
3541  }
3542  else {
3543  if (MaxDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] <= 180 - rjump) MaxDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] += rjump;
3544  }
3545  }
3546  DisplayCurve();
3547 }
3548 
3549 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
3550 // SEND AND RECEIVE A MODEL FILE
3551 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
3552 
3553 #define FILEPIPEADDRESS 0xFEFEFEFEFELL // Unique pipe address for FILE EXCHANGE
3554 #define BUFFERSIZE 28 // + 4 = 32
3555 #define FILEDATARATE RF24_250KBPS
3556 #define FILEPALEVEL RF24_PA_MAX
3557 #define FILECHANNEL 123
3558 #define FILETIMEOUT 30
3559 
3560 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
3561 
3563 void ReceiveModelFile()
3564 {
3565  uint64_t RXPipe;
3566  uint32_t RXTimer = 0;
3567 
3568  char ModelsView_filename[] = "filename";
3569  char ProgressStart[] = "vis Progress,1";
3570  char ProgressEnd[] = "vis Progress,0";
3571  char Progress[] = "Progress";
3572  char Fbuffer[BUFFERSIZE + 8]; // spare space
3573  uint8_t Fack = 1; // just a token byte
3574  char Waiting[] = "Waiting ";
3575  char WaitTime[6];
3576  char WaitMsg[17];
3577  char ThreeDots[] = "...";
3578  char Receiving[] = "Receiving ...";
3579  char TimeoutMsg[] = "TIMEOUT";
3580  char Success[] = "* Success! *";
3581  unsigned long Fsize = 0;
3582  unsigned long Fposition = 0;
3583  float SecondsElapsed = 0;
3584  uint8_t p = 5;
3585 #ifdef DB_MODEL_EXCHANGE
3586  uint8_t PacketNumber = 0;
3587  Serial.println("Receiving model ...");
3588  Serial.println(Waiting);
3589 #endif
3590  SendText(ModelsView_filename, Waiting);
3591  RXPipe = FILEPIPEADDRESS;
3592  Radio1.setChannel(FILECHANNEL);
3593  Radio1.flush_tx();
3594  Radio1.openReadingPipe(1, RXPipe);
3595  Radio1.startListening();
3596  RXTimer = millis(); // Start timer
3597  while (!Radio1.available()) { // Await the sender....
3598  delay(5);
3599  KickTheDog(); // Watchdog
3600  if ((millis() - RXTimer) / 1000 >= FILETIMEOUT) {
3601 #ifdef DB_MODEL_EXCHANGE
3602  Serial.println("Timeout");
3603 #endif
3604  SendText(ModelsView_filename, TimeoutMsg);
3605  SetThePipe(DefaultPipe);
3606  Radio1.setCRCLength(RF24_CRC_8);
3607  return; // Give up waiting
3608  }
3609  else {
3610  SecondsElapsed = (millis() - RXTimer) / 1000;
3611  if (SecondsElapsed == (int)SecondsElapsed) { // whole number of seconds?
3612  strcpy(WaitMsg, Waiting);
3613  strcat(WaitMsg, Str(WaitTime, (FILETIMEOUT - SecondsElapsed), 0));
3614  strcat(WaitMsg, ThreeDots);
3615  SendText(ModelsView_filename, WaitMsg); // Show user how long remains to wait
3616  }
3617  }
3618  } // *First* packet must have arrived!
3619  SendCommand(ProgressStart);
3620  SendValue(Progress, p);
3621  SendText(ModelsView_filename, Receiving);
3622  Radio1.writeAckPayload(1, &Fack, sizeof(Fack)); // Ack first packet
3623  Radio1.read(&Fbuffer, BUFFERSIZE + 4); // Read it was 12
3624  strcpy(SingleModelFile, Fbuffer); // Get filename
3625  Fsize = Fbuffer[BUFFERSIZE];
3626  Fsize += Fbuffer[BUFFERSIZE + 1] << 8;
3627  Fsize += Fbuffer[BUFFERSIZE + 2] << 16;
3628  Fsize += Fbuffer[BUFFERSIZE + 3] << 24; // Get file size
3629 #ifdef DB_MODEL_EXCHANGE
3630  Serial.println("CONNECTED!");
3631  Serial.print("FileName=");
3632  Serial.println(SingleModelFile);
3633  Serial.print("File size = ");
3634  Serial.println(Fsize);
3635 #endif
3636  Fposition = 0;
3637  ModelsFileNumber = SD.open(SingleModelFile, FILE_WRITE); // Open file to receive
3638  RXTimer = millis(); // zero timeout
3639  while ((Fposition < Fsize) && (millis() - RXTimer) / 1000 <= FILETIMEOUT) { // (Fposition<Fsize) ********************
3640  KickTheDog(); // Watchdog
3641  if (Radio1.available()) {
3642  Radio1.writeAckPayload(1, &Fack, sizeof(Fack));
3643  Radio1.read(&Fbuffer, BUFFERSIZE + 4);
3644  ModelsFileNumber.seek(Fposition); // Move filepointer
3645  ModelsFileNumber.write(Fbuffer, BUFFERSIZE); // Write part of file
3646  Fposition += BUFFERSIZE;
3647  p = ((float)Fposition / (float)Fsize) * 100;
3648  SendValue(Progress, p);
3649  delay(10);
3650 #ifdef DB_MODEL_EXCHANGE
3651  PacketNumber = Fbuffer[25];
3652  Serial.print("PacketNumber: ");
3653  Serial.println(PacketNumber);
3654  Serial.print("Local checksum: ");
3655  Serial.print(LCheckSum);
3656  Serial.print(" Remote checksum: ");
3657  Serial.println(RCheckSum);
3658 #endif
3659  }
3660  }
3661  SendValue(Progress, 100);
3662  ModelsFileNumber.close();
3663  BuildDirectory();
3664  SendText(ModelsView_filename, Success);
3665  delay(2000);
3666  SendText(ModelsView_filename, SingleModelFile);
3667  // Here the new model is imported for immediate use
3668  SingleModelFlag = true;
3669  CloseModelsFile();
3670  ReadOneModel(1);
3671  SingleModelFlag = false;
3672  CloseModelsFile();
3673  SaveAllParameters();
3674  CloseModelsFile();
3675  UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
3676  SetThePipe(DefaultPipe);
3677  Radio1.setCRCLength(RF24_CRC_8);
3678  SendCommand(ProgressEnd);
3679 }
3680 
3681 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
3682 
3684 void SendModelFile()
3685 {
3686  char ProgressStart[] = "vis Progress,1";
3687  char ProgressEnd[] = "vis Progress,0";
3688  char Progress[] = "Progress";
3689  uint64_t TXPipe;
3690  uint8_t Fack = 1;
3691  unsigned long Fsize = 0;
3692  unsigned long Fposition = 0;
3693  char Fbuffer[BUFFERSIZE + 8]; // spare space
3694  uint8_t PacketNumber = 0;
3695  int p = 5;
3696  SendCommand(ProgressStart);
3697  SendValue(Progress, p);
3698  delay(10);
3699 #ifdef DB_MODEL_EXCHANGE
3700  Serial.print("Sending model: ");
3701  Serial.println(SingleModelFile);
3702 #endif
3703  TXPipe = FILEPIPEADDRESS;
3704  ModelsFileNumber = SD.open(SingleModelFile, O_READ); // Open file for reading
3705  Fsize = ModelsFileNumber.size(); // Get file size
3706 #ifdef DB_MODEL_EXCHANGE
3707  Serial.print("File Size: ");
3708  Serial.print(Fsize);
3709  Serial.println(" bytes.");
3710 #endif
3711  Radio1.setChannel(FILECHANNEL);
3712  Radio1.setPALevel(FILEPALEVEL);
3713  Radio1.openWritingPipe(TXPipe);
3714  Radio1.stopListening();
3715  while (Fposition < Fsize) {
3716  KickTheDog(); // Watchdog
3717  p = ((float)Fposition / (float)Fsize) * 100;
3718  SendValue(Progress, p);
3719  PacketNumber++;
3720  if (PacketNumber == 1) {
3721  strcpy(Fbuffer, SingleModelFile); // Filename in first packet
3722  Fbuffer[BUFFERSIZE] = Fsize;
3723  Fbuffer[BUFFERSIZE + 1] = Fsize >> 8;
3724  Fbuffer[BUFFERSIZE + 2] = Fsize >> 16;
3725  Fbuffer[BUFFERSIZE + 3] = Fsize >> 24; // SEND FILE SIZE (four bytes)
3726  }
3727  else {
3728 
3729  ModelsFileNumber.seek(Fposition); // Move filepointer
3730  ModelsFileNumber.read(Fbuffer, BUFFERSIZE); // Read part of file
3731  Fposition += BUFFERSIZE;
3732  }
3733  if (Radio1.write(&Fbuffer, BUFFERSIZE + 4)) {
3734  delay(200); // allow time for receive and write
3735  if (Radio1.isAckPayloadAvailable()) {
3736  Radio1.read(&Fack, sizeof(Fack));
3737  }
3738  }
3739  else {
3740  if (PacketNumber == 2) { // error - no connection
3741  SetThePipe(DefaultPipe);
3742  SendCommand(ProgressEnd);
3743  return;
3744  }
3745  }
3746 #ifdef DB_MODEL_EXCHANGE
3747  Serial.println(PacketNumber);
3748 #endif
3749  }
3750  ModelsFileNumber.close();
3751 #ifdef DB_MODEL_EXCHANGE
3752  Serial.println("ALL SENT.");
3753 #endif
3754  SendValue(Progress, 100);
3755  delay(100);
3756  SetThePipe(DefaultPipe);
3757  Radio1.setCRCLength(RF24_CRC_8);
3758  SendCommand(ProgressEnd);
3759 }
3760 
3761 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
3762 
3763 void ShowFlightMode()
3764 {
3765  char FMPress1[] = "click fm1,1";
3766  char FMPress2[] = "click fm2,1";
3767  char FMPress3[] = "click fm3,1";
3768  char FMPress4[] = "click fm4,1";
3769  char FMPress10[] = "click fm1,0";
3770  char FMPress20[] = "click fm2,0";
3771  char FMPress30[] = "click fm3,0";
3772  char FMPress40[] = "click fm4,0";
3773  switch (FlightMode) {
3774  case 1:
3775  SendCommand(FMPress1);
3776  SendCommand(FMPress10);
3777  break;
3778  case 2:
3779  SendCommand(FMPress2);
3780  SendCommand(FMPress20);
3781  break;
3782  case 3:
3783  SendCommand(FMPress3);
3784  SendCommand(FMPress30);
3785  break;
3786  case 4:
3787  SendCommand(FMPress4);
3788  SendCommand(FMPress40);
3789  break;
3790  default:
3791  break;
3792  }
3793 }
3794 
3795 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
3796 
3797 void updateOneSwitchView()
3798 {
3799  char OneSwitchView_r0[] = "r0"; // Not used
3800  char OneSwitchView_r1[] = "r1"; // Flight modes
3801  char OneSwitchView_r2[] = "r2"; // Auto
3802  char OneSwitchView_r3[] = "r3"; // Ch9
3803  char OneSwitchView_r4[] = "r4"; // Ch10
3804  char OneSwitchView_r5[] = "r5"; // Ch11
3805  char OneSwitchView_r6[] = "r6"; // Ch12
3806  char OneSwitchViewc_revd[] = "c_revd"; // Reversed
3807  char SwNum[] = "Sw";
3808 
3809  if (SwitchEditNumber == 1) {
3810  ValueSent = false; // If no setting, = Not Used
3811  if (FMSwitch == 1) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r1, 1);
3812  if (AutoSwitch == 1) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r2, 1);
3813  if (Channel9Switch == 1) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r3, 1);
3814  if (Channel10Switch == 1) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r4, 1);
3815  if (Channel11Switch == 1) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r5, 1);
3816  if (Channel12Switch == 1) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r6, 1);
3817  if (!ValueSent) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r0, 1); // nothing yet, so not used
3818  if (Switch1Reversed) SendValue(OneSwitchViewc_revd, 1);
3819  }
3820  if (SwitchEditNumber == 2) {
3821  ValueSent = false;
3822  if (FMSwitch == 2) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r1, 1);
3823  if (AutoSwitch == 2) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r2, 1);
3824  if (Channel9Switch == 2) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r3, 1);
3825  if (Channel10Switch == 2) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r4, 1);
3826  if (Channel11Switch == 2) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r5, 1);
3827  if (Channel12Switch == 2) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r6, 1);
3828  if (!ValueSent) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r0, 1); // nothing yet, so not used
3829  if (Switch2Reversed) SendValue(OneSwitchViewc_revd, 1);
3830  }
3831  if (SwitchEditNumber == 3) {
3832  ValueSent = false;
3833  if (FMSwitch == 3) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r1, 1);
3834  if (AutoSwitch == 3) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r2, 1);
3835  if (Channel9Switch == 3) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r3, 1);
3836  if (Channel10Switch == 3) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r4, 1);
3837  if (Channel11Switch == 3) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r5, 1);
3838  if (Channel12Switch == 3) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r6, 1);
3839  if (!ValueSent) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r0, 1); // nothing yet, so not used
3840  if (Switch3Reversed) SendValue(OneSwitchViewc_revd, 1);
3841  }
3842  if (SwitchEditNumber == 4) {
3843  ValueSent = false;
3844  if (FMSwitch == 4) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r1, 1);
3845  if (AutoSwitch == 4) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r2, 1);
3846  if (Channel9Switch == 4) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r3, 1);
3847  if (Channel10Switch == 4) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r4, 1);
3848  if (Channel11Switch == 4) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r5, 1);
3849  if (Channel12Switch == 4) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r6, 1);
3850  if (!ValueSent) SendValue(OneSwitchView_r0, 1); // nothing yet, so not used
3851  if (Switch4Reversed) SendValue(OneSwitchViewc_revd, 1);
3852  }
3853  SendValue(SwNum, SwitchEditNumber); // show switch number
3854 }
3855 
3856 /*********************************************************************************************************************************/
3857

3935  char SvT11[] = "t11";
3936  char CMsg1[] = "Please move all controls\r\nto their full extremes several times,\r\nthen press the button again ...";
3937  char SvB0[] = "b0";
3938  char CMsg2[] = "Wiggle, then press!";
3939  char Cmsg3[] = "Please CENTRE all controls,\r\nWait a moment,\r\nthen press again...";
3940  char Cmsg4[] = "CENTRE ALL!";
3941  char Cmsg5[] = "To calibrate TX sticks,\r\npress the button below\r\nthen follow instructions here... ";
3942  char Cmsg6[] = "Calibrate TX sticks";
3943  char CaliNextion[] = "CaliNextion";
3944  char SaveType[] = "SaveType";
3945  char TypeView[] = "TypeView";
3946  char AeroplaneType[] = "mt1";

3955  char r4s[] = "r4s";

3959  char SwitchesView[] = "SwitchesView";
3960  char SwitchesView1[] = "SwitchesView1";
3961  char OneSwitchView[] = "OneSwitchView";
3962  char PageOneSwitchView[] = "page OneSwitchView";
3963  char PageSwitchView[] = "page SwitchesView";
3964  char InputsView[] = "InputsView";
3965  char InputsDone[] = "InputsDone";
3966  char InPutStick_c1[] = "c1";
3967  char InPutStick_c2[] = "c2";
3968  char InPutStick_c3[] = "c3";
3969  char InPutStick_c4[] = "c4";
3970  char InPutStick_c5[] = "c5";

3972  char InPutStick_c7[] = "c7";
3973  char InPutStick_c8[] = "c8";
3974  char InPutStick_c9[] = "c9";
3975  char InPutStick_c10[] = "c10";
3976  char InPutStick_c11[] = "c11";
3977  char InPutStick_c12[] = "c12";
3978  char InPutStick_c13[] = "c13";
3979  char InPutStick_c14[] = "c14";
3980  char InPutStick_c15[] = "c15";
3981  char InPutStick_c16[] = "c16";
3982  char Export[] = "Export";
3983  char Import[] = "Import";
3984  char ListFiles[] = "ListFiles";
3985  char Nextfile[] = "Nextfile";
3986  char Prevfile[] = "Prevfile";
3987  char DelFile[] = "DelFile";
3988  char ModExt[] = ".MOD";
3989  char FailSAVE[] = "FailSAVE";
3990  char FailSafe[] = "FailSafe";
3991  char fs1[] = "fs1";
3992  char fs2[] = "fs2";
3993  char fs3[] = "fs3";
3994  char fs4[] = "fs4";
3995  char fs5[] = "fs5";
3996  char fs6[] = "fs6";
3997  char fs7[] = "fs7";
3998  char fs8[] = "fs8";
3999  char fs9[] = "fs9";
4000  char fs10[] = "fs10";
4001  char fs11[] = "fs11";
4002  char fs12[] = "fs12";
4003  char fs13[] = "fs13";
4004  char fs14[] = "fs14";
4005  char fs15[] = "fs15";
4006  char fs16[] = "fs16";
4007  char CH1NAME[] = "CH1NAME=";
4008  char CH2NAME[] = "CH2NAME=";
4009  char CH3NAME[] = "CH3NAME=";
4010  char CH4NAME[] = "CH4NAME=";
4011  char CH5NAME[] = "CH5NAME=";
4012  char CH6NAME[] = "CH6NAME=";
4013  char CH7NAME[] = "CH7NAME=";
4014  char CH8NAME[] = "CH8NAME=";
4015  char CH9NAME[] = "CH9NAME=";
4016  char CH10NAME[] = "CH10NAME=";
4017  char CH11NAME[] = "CH11NAME=";
4018  char CH12NAME[] = "CH12NAME=";
4019  char CH13NAME[] = "CH13NAME=";
4020  char CH14NAME[] = "CH14NAME=";
4021  char CH15NAME[] = "CH15NAME=";
4022  char CH16NAME[] = "CH16NAME=";
4023  char MixesView_chM[] = "chM";
4024  char MixesView_chS[] = "chS";
4025  char ProgressStart[] = "vis Progress,1";
4026  char ProgressEnd[] = "vis Progress,0";
4027  char Progress[] = "Progress";
4028  char HelpView[] = "HelpView";
4029  char ModelsView_filename[] = "filename";
4030  char ReceiveModel[] = "ReceiveModel";
4031  char SendModel[] = "SendModel";
4032  char PowerOff[] = "PowerOff";
4033  char OffNow[] = "OffNow"; // force power off
4034  char StillConnected[] = "vis StillConnected,1";
4035  char NotStillConnected[] = "vis StillConnected,0";
4036  char OptionsView[] = "OptionsView";
4037  char OptionsViewS[] = "OptionsViewS";
4038  char Pto[] = "Pto";
4039  char Tx_Name[] = "TxName";
4040  char Exrite[] = "Exrite";
4041  char ExpR[] = "Exp";
4042  char Smooth[] = "Smooth";
4043  char Lines[] = "Lines";
4044  char Expon[] = "Expo"; // number display
4045  char GOTO[] = "GOTO:";
4046  char WhichPage[] = "page "; // excessive spaces for page name
4047  char AddMinute[] = "IncMinute";
4048  char Dec_Minute[] = "DecMinute";
4049  char Dec_Hour[] = "DecHour";
4050  char Inc_Hour[] = "IncHour";
4051  char Inc_Year[] = "IncYear";
4052  char Dec_Year[] = "DecYear";
4053  char Inc_Date[] = "IncDate";
4054  char Dec_Date[] = "DecDate";
4055  char Inc_Month[] = "IncMonth";
4056  char Dec_Month[] = "DecMonth";
4057 
4058  if (strlen(WordsIn) > 0) {
4059  StartInactvityTimeout();
4060 #ifdef DB_NEXTION
4061  Serial.print("From Nextion: ");
4062  Serial.println(WordsIn);
4063 #endif
4064 
4065  if (InStrng(SetupView, WordsIn) > 0) {
4066  CurrentView = MainSetupView;
4067  ClearText();
4068  SaveAllParameters(); // TODO HEER - mixes only
4069  SendCommand(page_SetupView);
4070  CurrentMode = NORMAL;
4071  DoScanEnd();
4072  return;
4073  }
4074 
4075  if (InStrng(HelpView, WordsIn) > 0) {
4076  SavedCurrentView = CurrentView;
4077  CurrentView = Help_View;
4078  SendHelp();
4079  return;
4080  }
4081  if (InStrng(Dec_Minute, WordsIn) > 0) {
4082  DecMinute();
4083  ClearText();
4084  return;
4085  }
4086  if (InStrng(AddMinute, WordsIn) > 0) {
4087  IncMinute();
4088  ClearText();
4089  return;
4090  }
4091 
4092  if (InStrng(Dec_Hour, WordsIn) > 0) {
4093  DecHour();
4094  ClearText();
4095  return;
4096  }
4097  if (InStrng(Inc_Hour, WordsIn) > 0) {
4098  IncHour();
4099  ClearText();
4100  return;
4101  }
4102 
4103  if (InStrng(Dec_Year, WordsIn) > 0) {
4104  DecYear();
4105  ClearText();
4106  return;
4107  }
4108  if (InStrng(Inc_Year, WordsIn) > 0) {
4109  IncYear();
4110  ClearText();
4111  return;
4112  }
4113 
4114  if (InStrng(Dec_Date, WordsIn) > 0) {
4115  DecDate();
4116  ClearText();
4117  return;
4118 
4119  }
4120  if (InStrng(Inc_Date, WordsIn) > 0) {
4121  IncDate();
4122  ClearText();
4123  return;
4124  }
4125 
4126  if (InStrng(Dec_Month, WordsIn) > 0) {
4127  DecMonth();
4128  ClearText();
4129  return;
4130  }
4131  if (InStrng(Inc_Month, WordsIn) > 0) {
4132  IncMonth();
4133  ClearText();
4134  return;
4135  }
4136 
4137  if (InStrng(OptionsViewS, WordsIn) > 0) {
4138  if (FHSSBottom < 1) FHSSBottom = 1;
4139  SendValue(FhssView_Rlow, FHSSBottom);
4140  SendValue(FhssView_Rhigh, FHSSTop);
4141  SendValue(ScreenViewTimeout, ScreenTimeout);
4142  SendValue(Pto, (Inactivity_Timeout / TICKSPERMINUTE));
4143  SendText(Tx_Name, TxName);
4144  CurrentView = Options_View;
4145  CurrentMode = NORMAL;
4146  ReviseBadChannelMax();
4147  ClearText();
4148  return;
4149  }
4150  if (InStrng(GOTO, WordsIn) > 0) {
4151  i = 5;
4152  while (uint8_t(WordsIn[i]) > 0 && i < 30) {
4153  WhichPage[i] = WordsIn[i];
4154  i++;
4155  WhichPage[i] = 0;
4156  } // Get page name to which to return
4157  SendCommand(WhichPage);
4158  CurrentView = SavedCurrentView;
4159  if (CurrentView == GraphView) {
4160  DisplayCurve();
4161  SendValue(CopyToAllFlightModes, 0);
4162  }
4163  if (CurrentView == Switches_View) {
4164  UpdateSwitchesDisplay();
4165  }
4166  if (CurrentView == One_Switch_View) {
4167  updateOneSwitchView();
4168  }
4169  if (CurrentView == ModelsView) {
4170  SendValue(ModelsView_ModelNumber, ModelNumber);
4171  }
4172  ClearText();
4173  return;
4174  }
4175 
4176  if (InStrng(Exrite, WordsIn) > 0) { // *******************
4177  if (GetValue(ExpR)) {
4178  InterpolationTypes[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] = 2;
4179  }
4180  if (GetValue(Smooth)) {
4181  InterpolationTypes[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] = 1;
4182  }
4183  if (GetValue(Lines)) {
4184  InterpolationTypes[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] = 0;
4185  }
4186  Exponential[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] = (GetValue(Expon));
4187  ClearText();
4188  DisplayCurve();
4189  return;
4190  }
4191 
4192  p = InStrng(OptionsView, WordsIn);
4193  if (p > 0) {
4194  i = strlen(OptionsView);
4195  j = 0;
4196  while (uint8_t(WordsIn[i]) > 0 && i < 100) {
4197  TxName[j] = WordsIn[i];
4198  j++;
4199  i++;
4200  TxName[j] = 0;
4201  }
4202  FHSSBottom = GetValue(FhssView_Rlow);
4203  FHSSTop = GetValue(FhssView_Rhigh);
4204  if (FHSSBottom > FHSSTop) {
4205  BoxOffset = FHSSBottom;
4206  FHSSBottom = FHSSTop;
4207  FHSSTop = BoxOffset;
4208  }
4209  if (FHSSBottom < 1) FHSSBottom = 1;
4210  if (FHSSTop > 125) FHSSTop = 125;
4211  if (FHSSBottom == FHSSTop) {
4212  FHSSBottom = 1;
4213  FHSSTop = 83;
4214  }
4215  ReviseBadChannelMax();
4216  ScreenTimeout = GetValue(ScreenViewTimeout);
4217  Inactivity_Timeout = GetValue(Pto) * TICKSPERMINUTE;
4218  if (Inactivity_Timeout < INACTIVITYMINIMUM) Inactivity_Timeout = INACTIVITYMINIMUM;
4219  if (Inactivity_Timeout > INACTIVITYMAXIMUM) Inactivity_Timeout = INACTIVITYMAXIMUM;
4220 
4221  SaveTXStuff();
4222  ClearText();
4223  return;
4224  }
4225 
4226  if (InStrng(ReceiveModel, WordsIn) > 0) {
4227  i = strlen(ReceiveModel);
4228  j = 0;
4229  while (uint8_t(WordsIn[i] && i < 100) > 0) {
4230  SingleModelFile[j] = WordsIn[i];
4231  j++;
4232  i++;
4233  SingleModelFile[j] = 0;
4234  } // got local name but won't use it.....
4235  ReceiveModelFile();
4236  return;
4237  }
4238  if (InStrng(PowerOff, WordsIn) > 0) {
4239  if (!LostContactFlag && BoundFlag) {
4240  SendCommand(StillConnected);
4241  delay(750); // 3/4 second
4242  SendCommand(NotStillConnected);
4243  }
4244  else {
4245  digitalWrite(POWER_OFF_PIN, HIGH);
4246  }
4247  return;
4248  }
4249 
4250  if (InStrng(OffNow, WordsIn) > 0) {
4251  digitalWrite(POWER_OFF_PIN, HIGH); // force OFF in Options View
4252  return;
4253  }
4254 
4255  if (InStrng(SendModel, WordsIn) > 0) {
4256  i = strlen(SendModel);
4257  j = 0;
4258  while (uint8_t(WordsIn[i]) > 0) {
4259  SingleModelFile[j] = WordsIn[i];
4260  j++;
4261  i++;
4262  SingleModelFile[j] = 0;
4263  }
4264  SendModelFile();
4265  return;
4266  }
4267 
4268  if (InStrng(FailSAVE, WordsIn) > 0) {
4269  SendCommand(ProgressStart);
4270  SendValue(Progress, 0);
4271  FailSafeChannel[0] = GetValue(fs1);
4272  SendValue(Progress, 5);
4273  FailSafeChannel[1] = GetValue(fs2);
4274  SendValue(Progress, 15);
4275  FailSafeChannel[2] = GetValue(fs3);
4276  SendValue(Progress, 25);
4277  FailSafeChannel[3] = GetValue(fs4);
4278  SendValue(Progress, 35);
4279  FailSafeChannel[4] = GetValue(fs5);
4280  SendValue(Progress, 45);
4281  FailSafeChannel[5] = GetValue(fs6);
4282  SendValue(Progress, 50);
4283  FailSafeChannel[6] = GetValue(fs7);
4284  SendValue(Progress, 55);
4285  FailSafeChannel[7] = GetValue(fs8);
4286  SendValue(Progress, 60);
4287  FailSafeChannel[8] = GetValue(fs9);
4288  SendValue(Progress, 65);
4289  FailSafeChannel[9] = GetValue(fs10);
4290  SendValue(Progress, 70);
4291  FailSafeChannel[10] = GetValue(fs11);
4292  SendValue(Progress, 71);
4293  FailSafeChannel[11] = GetValue(fs12);
4294  SendValue(Progress, 72);
4295  FailSafeChannel[12] = GetValue(fs13);
4296  SendValue(Progress, 75);
4297  FailSafeChannel[13] = GetValue(fs14);
4298  SendValue(Progress, 80);
4299  FailSafeChannel[14] = GetValue(fs15);
4300  SendValue(Progress, 85);
4301  FailSafeChannel[15] = GetValue(fs16);
4302  SendValue(Progress, 90);
4303  SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
4304  SendValue(Progress, 100);
4305  delay(200);
4306  SaveFailSafeNow = true;
4307  SendCommand(ProgressEnd);
4308  return;
4309  }
4310 
4311  if (InStrng(FailSafe, WordsIn) > 0) {
4312  SendValue(fs1, FailSafeChannel[0]);
4313  SendValue(fs2, FailSafeChannel[1]);
4314  SendValue(fs3, FailSafeChannel[2]);
4315  SendValue(fs4, FailSafeChannel[3]);
4316  SendValue(fs5, FailSafeChannel[4]);
4317  SendValue(fs6, FailSafeChannel[5]);
4318  SendValue(fs7, FailSafeChannel[6]);
4319  SendValue(fs8, FailSafeChannel[7]);
4320  SendValue(fs9, FailSafeChannel[8]);
4321  SendValue(fs10, FailSafeChannel[9]);
4322  SendValue(fs11, FailSafeChannel[10]);
4323  SendValue(fs12, FailSafeChannel[11]);
4324  SendValue(fs13, FailSafeChannel[12]);
4325  SendValue(fs14, FailSafeChannel[13]);
4326  SendValue(fs15, FailSafeChannel[14]);
4327  SendValue(fs16, FailSafeChannel[15]);
4328  return;
4329  }
4330 
4331  if (InStrng(OneSwitchView, WordsIn) > 0) {
4332  SwitchEditNumber = GetChannel(); // which switch?
4333  CurrentView = One_Switch_View;
4334  SendCommand(PageOneSwitchView); // edit one switch - could be 1-4
4335  updateOneSwitchView();
4336  return;
4337  }
4338 
4339  if (InStrng(SwitchesView1, WordsIn) > 0) { // read switch values from screen (could be 1-4)
4340  if (GetValue(OneSwitchView_r1)) {
4341  FMSwitch = SwitchEditNumber;
4342  }
4343  else {
4344  if (FMSwitch == SwitchEditNumber) FMSwitch = 0;
4345  }
4346  if (GetValue(OneSwitchView_r2)) {
4347  AutoSwitch = SwitchEditNumber;
4348  }
4349  else {
4350  if (AutoSwitch == SwitchEditNumber) AutoSwitch = 0;
4351  }
4352  if (GetValue(OneSwitchView_r3)) {
4353  Channel9Switch = SwitchEditNumber;
4354  }
4355  else {
4356  if (Channel9Switch == SwitchEditNumber) Channel9Switch = 0;
4357  }
4358  if (GetValue(OneSwitchView_r4)) {
4359  Channel10Switch = SwitchEditNumber;
4360  }
4361  else {
4362  if (Channel10Switch == SwitchEditNumber) Channel10Switch = 0;
4363  }
4364  if (GetValue(OneSwitchView_r5)) {
4365  Channel11Switch = SwitchEditNumber;
4366  }
4367  else {
4368  if (Channel11Switch == SwitchEditNumber) Channel11Switch = 0;
4369  }
4370  if (GetValue(OneSwitchView_r6)) {
4371  Channel12Switch = SwitchEditNumber;
4372  }
4373  else {
4374  if (Channel12Switch == SwitchEditNumber) Channel12Switch = 0;
4375  }
4376 
4377  if (SwitchEditNumber == 1) {
4378  if (GetValue(OneSwitchViewc_revd)) {
4379  Switch1Reversed = true;
4380  }
4381  else {
4382  Switch1Reversed = false;
4383  }
4384  }
4385  if (SwitchEditNumber == 2) {
4386  if (GetValue(OneSwitchViewc_revd)) {
4387  Switch2Reversed = true;
4388  }
4389  else {
4390  Switch2Reversed = false;
4391  }
4392  }
4393  if (SwitchEditNumber == 3) {
4394  if (GetValue(OneSwitchViewc_revd)) {
4395  Switch3Reversed = true;
4396  }
4397  else {
4398  Switch3Reversed = false;
4399  }
4400  }
4401  if (SwitchEditNumber == 4) {
4402  if (GetValue(OneSwitchViewc_revd)) {
4403  Switch4Reversed = true;
4404  }
4405  else {
4406  Switch4Reversed = false;
4407  }
4408  }
4409  SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
4410  SendCommand(PageSwitchView); // change to all switches screen
4411  UpdateSwitchesDisplay(); // update its info
4412  return;
4413  }
4414  if (InStrng(InputsView, WordsIn) > 0) {
4415  CurrentView = Inputs_View;
4416  UpdateButtonLabels();
4417  return;
4418  }
4419 
4420  if (InStrng(InputsDone, WordsIn) > 0) {
4421  SendCommand(ProgressStart);
4422  InPutStick[0] = CheckRange_0_16(GetValue(InPutStick_c1)) - 1;
4423  SendValue(Progress, 5);
4424  InPutStick[1] = CheckRange_0_16(GetValue(InPutStick_c2)) - 1;
4425  SendValue(Progress, 15);
4426  InPutStick[2] = CheckRange_0_16(GetValue(InPutStick_c3)) - 1;
4427  SendValue(Progress, 25);
4428  InPutStick[3] = CheckRange_0_16(GetValue(InPutStick_c4)) - 1;
4429  SendValue(Progress, 35);
4430  InPutStick[4] = CheckRange_0_16(GetValue(InPutStick_c5)) - 1;
4431  SendValue(Progress, 45);
4432  InPutStick[5] = CheckRange_0_16(GetValue(InPutStick_c6)) - 1;
4433  SendValue(Progress, 55);
4434  InPutStick[6] = CheckRange_0_16(GetValue(InPutStick_c7)) - 1;
4435  SendValue(Progress, 65);
4436  InPutStick[7] = CheckRange_0_16(GetValue(InPutStick_c8)) - 1;
4437  SendValue(Progress, 75);
4438  InPutStick[8] = CheckRange_0_16(GetValue(InPutStick_c9)) - 1;
4439  SendValue(Progress, 80);
4440  InPutStick[9] = CheckRange_0_16(GetValue(InPutStick_c10)) - 1;
4441  SendValue(Progress, 85);
4442  InPutStick[10] = CheckRange_0_16(GetValue(InPutStick_c11)) - 1;
4443  SendValue(Progress, 86);
4444  InPutStick[11] = CheckRange_0_16(GetValue(InPutStick_c12)) - 1;
4445  SendValue(Progress, 87);
4446  InPutStick[12] = CheckRange_0_16(GetValue(InPutStick_c13)) - 1;
4447  SendValue(Progress, 88);
4448  InPutStick[13] = CheckRange_0_16(GetValue(InPutStick_c14)) - 1;
4449  SendValue(Progress, 89);
4450  InPutStick[14] = CheckRange_0_16(GetValue(InPutStick_c15)) - 1;
4451  SendValue(Progress, 95);
4452  InPutStick[15] = CheckRange_0_16(GetValue(InPutStick_c16)) - 1;
4453  SendValue(Progress, 99);
4454  SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
4455  SendValue(Progress, 100);
4456  CurrentMode = NORMAL;
4457  SendCommand(ProgressEnd);
4458  UpdateButtonLabels();
4459  SendCommand(page_SetupView);
4460  return;
4461  }
