4559  if (InStrng(DelFile, WordsIn) > 0) { // Delete a file
4560  j = 0;
4561  p = InStrng(DelFile, WordsIn);
4562  i = p + 7;
4563  while (uint8_t(WordsIn[i]) > 0) {
4564  SingleModelFile[j] = WordsIn[i];
4565  j++;
4566  i++;
4567  SingleModelFile[j] = 0;
4568  }
4569  SD.remove(SingleModelFile);
4570  BuildDirectory();
4571  FileNumberInView--;
4572  ShowFileNumber();
4573  CloseModelsFile();
4574  return;
4575  }
4576 
4577  if (InStrng(Nextfile, WordsIn)) { // show next file
4578  FileNumberInView++;
4579  ShowFileNumber();
4580  CloseModelsFile();
4581  return;
4582  }
4583 
4584  if (InStrng(Prevfile, WordsIn)) { // show prev file
4585  FileNumberInView--;
4586  ShowFileNumber();
4587  CloseModelsFile();
4588  return;
4589  }
4590 
4591  if (InStrng(SwitchesView, WordsIn)) {
4592  UpdateSwitchesDisplay(); // display saved values
4593  CurrentView = Switches_View;
4594  return;
4595  }
4596 
4597  if (InStrng(Calibrate_View, WordsIn)) {
4598  Force_ReDisplay();
4599  CurrentView = CalibrateView;
4600  ClearText();
4601  return;
4602  }
4603 
4604  p = InStrng(Export, WordsIn);
4605  if (p > 0) {
4606  j = 0;
4607  i = p + 5;
4608  while ((WordsIn[i]) > 0) {
4609  if (WordsIn[i] >= 97 && WordsIn[i] <= 122) {
4610  WordsIn[i] &= ~0x20;
4611  } // upper case only
4612  if (WordsIn[i] <= 32 || WordsIn[i] > 127) break;
4613  SingleModelFile[j] = WordsIn[i];
4614  j++;
4615  i++;
4616  SingleModelFile[j] = 0;
4617  }
4618  if (InStrng(ModExt, SingleModelFile) == 0) {
4619  strcat(SingleModelFile, ModExt);
4620  }
4621  SendText(ModelsView_filename, SingleModelFile);
4622  SendCommand(ProgressStart);
4623  delay(20);
4624  SendValue(Progress, 10);
4625  delay(20);
4626  CloseModelsFile();
4627  for (int WriteTwice = 1; WriteTwice <= 2; WriteTwice++) { // if a new file, write twice seems to be needed!!
4628  SingleModelFlag = true;
4629  OpenModelsFile();
4630  SendValue(Progress, 25);
4631  delay(10);
4632  SaveOneModel(1);
4633  SendValue(Progress, 50);
4634  delay(10);
4635  CloseModelsFile();
4636  }
4637  SingleModelFlag = false;
4638  SendValue(Progress, 75);
4639  delay(10);
4640  BuildDirectory();
4641  SendValue(Progress, 100);
4642  delay(10);
4643  SendCommand(ProgressEnd);
4644  if (FileError) ShowFileErrorMsg();
4645  return;
4646  }
4647 
4648  p = InStrng(Import, WordsIn);
4649  if (p > 0) {
4650  SendCommand(ProgressStart);
4651  delay(10);
4652  SendValue(Progress, 5);
4653  delay(10);
4654  j = 0;
4655  i = p + 5;
4656  while (WordsIn[i] > 0) {
4657  if (WordsIn[i] >= 97 && WordsIn[i] <= 122) {
4658  WordsIn[i] &= ~0x20;
4659  }
4660  SingleModelFile[j] = WordsIn[i];
4661  j++;
4662  i++;
4663  SingleModelFile[j] = 0;
4664  }
4665  if (InStrng(ModExt, SingleModelFile) == 0) strcat(SingleModelFile, ModExt);
4666  SingleModelFlag = true;
4667  SendValue(Progress, 10);
4668  delay(10);
4669  CloseModelsFile();
4670  ReadOneModel(1);
4671  SendValue(Progress, 50);
4672  delay(10);
4673  SingleModelFlag = false;
4674  CloseModelsFile();
4675  SendValue(Progress, 75);
4676  delay(10);
4677  SaveAllParameters();
4678  CloseModelsFile();
4679  UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
4680  SendValue(Progress, 100);
4681  delay(10);
4682  SendCommand(ProgressEnd);
4683  if (FileError) ShowFileErrorMsg();
4684  return;
4685  }
4686 
4687  if (InStrng(ListFiles, WordsIn) > 0) {
4688  ShowDirectory(); //
4689  return;
4690  }
4691 
4692  if (InStrng(CaliNextion, WordsIn) > 0) {
4693  SendCommand(CalibrateNow);
4694  ClearText();
4695  return;
4696  }
4697 
4698  if (InStrng(SetupViewFM, WordsIn) > 0) { // New model name occurs at offset 12 in WordsIn
4699  i = 0;
4700  while (WordsIn[i + 12] > 0) {
4701  ModelName[i] = WordsIn[i + 12];
4702  ModelName[i + 1] = 0;
4703  i++;
4704  } // copy new name
4705  SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
4706  ClearText();
4707  SendCommand(page_SetupView);
4708  CurrentMode = NORMAL; // Send data again
4709  CurrentView = MainSetupView;
4710  return;
4711  }
4712 
4713  if (InStrng(ModelNMSave, WordsIn) > 0) { // Save modelname without exiting screen
4714  i = 0;
4715  while (WordsIn[i + 12] > 0) {
4716  ModelName[i] = WordsIn[i + 12];
4717  ModelName[i + 1] = 0;
4718  i++;
4719  } // copy new name
4720  SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
4721  ClearText();
4722  return;
4723  }
4724 
4725  if (InStrng(GoSetupView, WordsIn) > 0) {
4726  ClearText();
4727  CurrentView = MainSetupView;
4728  if (!Connected){
4729  if (RecentPacketsLost > 50){
4730  BlueLedOn();
4731  SetupFlag=true;
4732  }
4733  }
4734  SendCommand(page_SetupView); //
4735  return;
4736  }
4737 
4738  if (InStrng(GoFrontView, WordsIn) > 0) {
4739  ClearText();
4740  SetupFlag = false;
4741  CurrentView = FrontView;
4742  SendCommand(page_FrontView);
4743  UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
4744  ShowFlightMode();
4745  LastShowTime = 0; // this is to make redisplay sooner
4746  LastTimeRead = 0; // this is to make redisplay sooner
4747  return;
4748  }
4749 
4750  if (InStrng(Gains_View, WordsIn) > 0) {
4751  CurrentView = GainsView;
4752  UpdateGainsView();
4753  return;
4754  }
4755 
4756  if (InStrng(SaveGains, WordsIn) > 0) {
4757  SaveNewGains();
4758  return;
4759  }
4760  if (InStrng(TypeView, WordsIn) > 0) {
4761  SendValue(AeroplaneType, 0);
4762  SendValue(HelicopterType, 0);
4763  SendValue(QuadcopterType, 0);
4764  SendValue(HexacopterType, 0);
4765  SendValue(OctocopterType, 0);
4766  if (ModelType == 0) ModelType = 1;
4767  if (ModelType == 1) SendValue(AeroplaneType, 1);
4768  if (ModelType == 2) SendValue(HelicopterType, 1);
4769  if (ModelType == 3) SendValue(QuadcopterType, 1);
4770  if (ModelType == 4) SendValue(HexacopterType, 1);
4771  if (ModelType == 5) SendValue(OctocopterType, 1);
4772 
4773  SendValue(r2s, 0); // Zero all RX batt cell count
4774  SendValue(r3s, 0);
4775  SendValue(r4s, 0);
4776  SendValue(r5s, 0);
4777  SendValue(r6s, 0);
4778  if (RXCellCount == 2) SendValue(r2s, 1); // Then update RX batt cell count
4779  if (RXCellCount == 3) SendValue(r3s, 1);
4780  if (RXCellCount == 4) SendValue(r4s, 1);
4781  if (RXCellCount == 5) SendValue(r5s, 1);
4782  if (RXCellCount == 6) SendValue(r6s, 1);
4783  return;
4784  }
4785 
4786  if (InStrng(SaveType, WordsIn) > 0) {
4787  ButtonRed(SaveTypeButton);
4788  ButtonRed(OKTypeButton);
4789  if (GetValue(AeroplaneType)) ModelType = 1;
4790  if (GetValue(HelicopterType)) ModelType = 2;
4791  if (GetValue(QuadcopterType)) ModelType = 3;
4792  if (GetValue(HexacopterType)) ModelType = 4;
4793  if (GetValue(OctocopterType)) ModelType = 5;
4794  if (ModelType == 0) ModelType = 1;
4795  SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
4796  ButtonWhite(SaveTypeButton);
4797  ButtonWhite(OKTypeButton);
4798  return;
4799  }
4800 
4801  if (InStrng(RXBAT, WordsIn) > 0) { // UPdate RX batt cell count
4802  if (GetValue(r2s) == 1) RXCellCount = 2;
4803  if (GetValue(r3s) == 1) RXCellCount = 3;
4804  if (GetValue(r4s) == 1) RXCellCount = 4;
4805  if (GetValue(r5s) == 1) RXCellCount = 5;
4806  if (GetValue(r6s) == 1) RXCellCount = 6;
4807  SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
4808  return;
4809  }
4810 
4811  if (InStrng(TrimView, WordsIn) > 0) { // TrimView just appeared, so update it.
4812  CurrentView = Trim_View;
4813  UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere(); // also updates trimview
4814  ClearText();
4815  return;
4816  }
4817 
4818  if (InStrng(RTRIM, WordsIn) > 0) {
4819  TrimsReversed[FlightMode][0] = GetValue(TrimView_r1); // Fudged as I'd numbered differently!
4820  TrimsReversed[FlightMode][1] = GetValue(TrimView_r4);
4821  TrimsReversed[FlightMode][2] = GetValue(TrimView_r2);
4822  TrimsReversed[FlightMode][3] = GetValue(TrimView_r3);
4823  ClearText();
4824  return;
4825  }
4826 
4827  if (InStrng(TRIMS50, WordsIn) > 0) {
4828  for (i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
4829  Trims[FlightMode][i] = 80; // Mid value is 80
4830  }
4831  }
4832  if (InStrng(TR1, WordsIn) > 0) { // TR1->0
4833  Trims[FlightMode][0] = WordsIn[3];
4834  }
4835  if (InStrng(TR4, WordsIn) > 0) { // TR4 ->1
4836  Trims[FlightMode][1] = WordsIn[3];
4837  }
4838  if (InStrng(TR2, WordsIn) > 0) { // TR2 ->2
4839  Trims[FlightMode][2] = WordsIn[3];
4840  }
4841  if (InStrng(TR3, WordsIn) > 0) { // TR3 ->3
4842  Trims[FlightMode][3] = WordsIn[3];
4843  }
4844 
4845  if (InStrng(Trim, WordsIn) > 0) {
4846  SaveOneModel(ModelNumber); // save trims to SDcard
4847  }
4848  if (InStrng(Models_View, WordsIn) > 0) {
4849  ReadOneModel(ModelNumber);
4850  CurrentView = ModelsView;
4851  UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
4852  SendValue(ModelsView_ModelNumber, ModelNumber);
4853  BuildDirectory(); // of SD card
4854  ShowFileNumber();
4855  }
4856  if (InStrng(LoadModel, WordsIn) > 0) {
4857  ModelNumber = GetValue(ModelsView_ModelNumber);
4858  if (ModelNumber >= 99) {
4859  ModelNumber = 1;
4860  SendValue(ModelsView_ModelNumber, ModelNumber);
4861  }
4862  SendCommand(ProgressStart);
4863  SendValue(Progress, 5);
4864  delay(10);
4865  SendValue(Progress, 50);
4866  delay(20);
4867  ReadOneModel(ModelNumber);
4868  SendValue(Progress, 75);
4869  delay(10);
4870  UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
4871  SendValue(Progress, 99);
4872  delay(10);
4873  SaveTXStuff();
4874  SendValue(Progress, 100);
4875  delay(20);
4876  SendCommand(ProgressEnd);
4877  }
4878 
4879  if (InStrng(Delete, WordsIn) > 0) {
4880  ModelNumber = GetValue(ModelsView_ModelNumber);
4881  SetDefaultValues();
4882  }
4883 
4884  if (InStrng(Write, WordsIn) > 0) { // write new data to SD
4885  p = GetValue(CopyToAllFlightModes);
4886  if (p == 1) {
4887  for (p = 1; p <= 4; p++) {
4888  if (p != FlightMode) {
4889  MinDegrees[p][ChanneltoSet - 1] = MinDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1];
4890  MidLowDegrees[p][ChanneltoSet - 1] = MidLowDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1];
4891  CentreDegrees[p][ChanneltoSet - 1] = CentreDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1];
4892  MidHiDegrees[p][ChanneltoSet - 1] = MidHiDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1];
4893  MaxDegrees[p][ChanneltoSet - 1] = MaxDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1];
4894  InterpolationTypes[p][ChanneltoSet - 1] = InterpolationTypes[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1];
4895  Exponential[p][ChanneltoSet - 1] = Exponential[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1];
4896  }
4897  }
4898  }
4899  ChanneltoSet = 0;
4900  SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
4901  Force_ReDisplay();
4902  SendCommand(page_SticksView); // Set to SticksView
4903  CurrentView = SticksView;
4904  UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
4905  }
4906 
4907  if (InStrng(Setup, WordsIn) > 0) { // Which channel to setup ... Goes to GraphView
4908  ChanneltoSet = GetChannel();
4909  ClearText();
4910  SendCommand(page_GraphView); // Set to GraphView
4911  CurrentView = GraphView;
4912  DisplayCurve(); // redisplay curve
4913  updateInterpolationTypes();
4914  UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
4915  SendValue(CopyToAllFlightModes, 0);
4916  }
4917 
4918  p = (InStrng(Front_View, WordsIn)); //which screen is in view?
4919  if (p > 0) {
4920  CurrentView = FrontView;
4921  ClearText();
4922  PreviousFlightMode = 250; // sure to be different
4923  CurrentMode = NORMAL;
4924  UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
4925  }
4926 
4927  p = (InStrng(Sticks_View, WordsIn));
4928  if (p > 0) {
4929  Force_ReDisplay();
4930  CurrentView = SticksView;
4931  SendCommand(page_SticksView); // Set to SticksView
4932  UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
4933  UpdateButtonLabels();
4934  }
4935 
4936  if (InStrng(Fhss_View, WordsIn))
4937  {
4938  delay(200);
4939  DrawFhssBox();
4940  DoScanInit();
4941  CurrentMode = SCANWAVEBAND;
4942  ClearText();
4943  return;
4944  }
4945 
4946  if (InStrng(ReScan, WordsIn))
4947  {
4948  DrawFhssBox();
4949  DoScanInit();
4950  CurrentMode = SCANWAVEBAND;
4951  ClearText();
4952  return;
4953  }
4954 
4955  p = (InStrng(MIXES_VIEW, WordsIn)); //
4956  if (p > 0) {
4957  CurrentView = MixesView;
4958  UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
4959  if (MixNumber == 0) MixNumber = 1;
4960  LastMixNumber = 33; // just to be differernt
4961  SendValue(MixesView_MixNumber, MixNumber); // New load of mix window
4962  }
4963 
4964  p = (InStrng(Mixes_View, WordsIn)); // Get New Mixes!
4965  if (p > 0) {
4966  CurrentView = MixesView;
4967  UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
4968  MixNumber = GetValue(MixesView_MixNumber);
4969  if (LastMixNumber != MixNumber) { // Did it change?
4970  LastMixNumber = MixNumber;
4971  SendMixValues();
4972  }
4973  else {
4974  Mixes[MixNumber][M_Enabled] = GetValue(MixesView_Enabled);
4975  Mixes[MixNumber][M_FlightMode] = GetValue(MixesView_FlightMode);
4976  Mixes[MixNumber][M_MasterChannel] = GetValue(MixesView_MasterChannel);
4977  Mixes[MixNumber][M_SlaveChannel] = GetValue(MixesView_SlaveChannel);
4978  Mixes[MixNumber][M_Reversed] = GetValue(MixesView_Reversed);
4979  Mixes[MixNumber][M_Percent] = GetValue(MixesView_Percent);
4980  SendText(MixesView_chM, ChannelNames[Mixes[MixNumber][M_MasterChannel] - 1]);
4981  SendText(MixesView_chS, ChannelNames[Mixes[MixNumber][M_SlaveChannel] - 1]);
4982  }
4983  }
4984 
4985  if (InStrng(Graph_View, WordsIn))
4986  {
4987  CurrentView = GraphView;
4988  }
4989 
4990  if (InStrng(Data_View, WordsIn))
4991  {
4992  CurrentMode = NORMAL;
4993  delay(200); // allow time for screen to display
4994  CurrentView = DataView;
4995  LastShowTime = 0;
4996  }
4997 
4998  if (InStrng(Fhss_View, WordsIn))
4999  {
5000  CurrentView = FhssView;
5001  BlueLedOn();
5002  }
5003 
5004  if (InStrng(bind, WordsIn))
5005  {
5006  BindNow();
5007  }
5008 
5009  if (InStrng(FM1, WordsIn))
5010  {
5011  FlightMode = 1;
5012  PreviousFlightMode = 1;
5013  UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
5014  }
5015 
5016  if (InStrng(FM2, WordsIn))
5017  if (p > 0) {
5018  FlightMode = 2;
5019  PreviousFlightMode = 2;
5020  UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
5021  }
5022 
5023  if (InStrng(FM3, WordsIn))
5024  {
5025  FlightMode = 3;
5026  PreviousFlightMode = 3;
5027  UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
5028  }
5029 
5030  if (InStrng(FM4, WordsIn))
5031  {
5032  FlightMode = 4;
5033  PreviousFlightMode = 4;
5034  UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
5035  }
5036  if (InStrng(midyup, WordsIn)) // midy up?
5037  {
5038  CentreDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1]++;
5039  DisplayCurve();
5040  ClearText();
5041  }
5042 
5043  if (InStrng(midydown, WordsIn)) // midy down?
5044  {
5045  CentreDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1]--;
5046  DisplayCurve();
5047  ClearText();
5048  }
5049 
5050  if (InStrng(midhiyup, WordsIn)) // midhiy up?
5051  {
5052  MidHiDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1]++;
5053  DisplayCurve();
5054  ClearText();
5055  }
5056 
5057  if (InStrng(midhiydown, WordsIn)) // midhiy down?
5058  {
5059  MidHiDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1]--;
5060  DisplayCurve();
5061  ClearText();
5062  }
5063 
5064  if (InStrng(midlowyup, WordsIn)) // midlowy up?
5065  {
5066  MidLowDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1]++;
5067  DisplayCurve();
5068  ClearText();
5069  }
5070 
5071  if (InStrng(midlowydown, WordsIn)) // midlowy down?
5072  {
5073  MidLowDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1]--;
5074  DisplayCurve();
5075  ClearText();
5076  }
5077 
5078  if (InStrng(yy1up, WordsIn)) // yy1 up?
5079  {
5080  MaxDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1]++;
5081  DisplayCurve();
5082  ClearText();
5083  }
5084 
5085  if (InStrng(yy1down, WordsIn)) // yy1 down?
5086  {
5087  MaxDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1]--;
5088  DisplayCurve();
5089  ClearText();
5090  }
5091 
5092  if (InStrng(yy2up, WordsIn)) // yy1 up?
5093  {
5094  MinDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1]++;
5095  DisplayCurve();
5096  ClearText();
5097  }
5098 
5099  if (InStrng(yy2down, WordsIn)) // yy1 down?
5100  {
5101  MinDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1]--;
5102  DisplayCurve();
5103  ClearText();
5104  }
5105 
5106  if (InStrng(Reset, WordsIn)) // RESET?
5107  {
5108  MinDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] = 30;
5109  MidLowDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] = 60;
5110  CentreDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] = 90;
5111  MidHiDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] = 120;
5112  MaxDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] = 150;
5113  Exponential[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] = 0;
5114  InterpolationTypes[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] = 2; // expo = default
5115  DisplayCurve();
5116  ClearText();
5117  }
5118 
5119  if (InStrng(Reverse, WordsIn)) // REVERSE?
5120  {
5121  p = MinDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1];
5122  MinDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] = 180 - p;
5123  p = MidLowDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1];
5124  MidLowDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] = 180 - p;
5125  p = CentreDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1];
5126  CentreDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] = 180 - p;
5127  p = MidHiDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1];
5128  MidHiDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] = 180 - p;
5129  p = MaxDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1];
5130  MaxDegrees[FlightMode][ChanneltoSet - 1] = 180 - p;
5131  DisplayCurve();
5132  ClearText();
5133  }
5134  p = (InStrng(ClickX, WordsIn)); // Clicked to move point?
5135  if (p > 0) {
5136  XtouchPlace = GetNextNumber(p + 7, WordsIn);
5137  }
5138  p = (InStrng(ClickY, WordsIn)); // Clicked to move point?
5139  if (p > 0) {
5140  YtouchPlace = GetNextNumber(p + 7, WordsIn);
5141  MovePoint();
5142  }
5143  if (CurrentMode == 0) {
5144  if (strcmp(WordsIn, "Calibrate1") == 0) {
5145  CurrentMode = CALIBRATELIMITS;
5146  CentreMaxMins();
5147  SendText(SvT11, CMsg1);
5148  SendText(SvB0, CMsg2);
5149  ClearText();
5150  return;
5151  }
5152  }
5153 
5154  if (CurrentMode == 1) {
5155  if (strcmp(WordsIn, "Calibrate1") == 0) {
5156  CurrentMode = CENTRESTICKS;
5157  SendText(SvT11, Cmsg3);
5158  SendText(SvB0, Cmsg4);
5159  ClearText();
5160  return;
5161  }
5162  }
5163  if (CurrentMode == 2) {
5164  if (strcmp(WordsIn, "Calibrate1") == 0) {
5165  CurrentMode = NORMAL;
5166  SaveAllParameters();
5167  SendText(SvT11, Cmsg5);
5168  SendText(SvB0, Cmsg6);
5169  SendValue1(NextionSleepTime, ScreenTimeout); // Re enable timeout
5170  ClearText();
5171  }
5172  }
5173  }
5174  ClearText(); // Let's have cleared text for next one!
5175 } // end Button_was_pressed()
5176 
5177 /************************************************************************************************************/
5178 
5179 uint16_t MakeTwobytes(bool* f)
5180 { // Pass arraypointer. Returns the two bytes
5181  uint16_t tb = 0; // all false is default
5182  for (i = 0; i < 16; i++) {
5183  if (f[15 - i] == true) {
5184  tb |= 1 << (i);
5185  } // sets a bit if true
5186  }
5187  return tb;
5188 }
5189 
5190 /************************************************************************************************************/
5191 
5192 void LoadPacketData()
5193 { // MUST NOT ADD MORE
5194 
5195  uint16_t Twobytes = 0;
5196  uint8_t uint8_t1;
5197  uint8_t uint8_t2;
5198 
5199  SendBuffer[CHANNELSUSED + 1] = PacketNumber; // to let reciever know current packet number
5200 #ifdef OLD_FHSS
5201  SendBuffer[CHANNELSUSED + 2] = NextFrequency; // Send next frequency
5202 #endif
5203  Twobytes = MakeTwobytes(FailSafeChannel); // 16 bool values compressed to 16 bits
5204  uint8_t1 = uint8_t(Twobytes >> 8); // sent as two bytes
5205  uint8_t2 = uint8_t(Twobytes & 0x00FF);
5206 
5207  switch (PacketNumber) {
5208  case 3:
5209  SendBuffer[CHANNELSUSED + 3] = rollp[FlightMode];
5210  break;
5211  case 4:
5212  SendBuffer[CHANNELSUSED + 3] = rolli[FlightMode];
5213  break;
5214  case 5:
5215  SendBuffer[CHANNELSUSED + 3] = rolld[FlightMode];
5216  break;
5217  case 6:
5218  if (ModelDetected) SendBuffer[CHANNELSUSED + 3] = ModelNumber; // send model number but not before reading one!
5219  break;
5220  case 7:
5221  // // no longer used
5222  break;
5223  case 8:
5224  // // no longer used
5225  break;
5226  case 9:
5227  SendBuffer[CHANNELSUSED + 3] = yawp[FlightMode];
5228  break;
5229  case 10:
5230  SendBuffer[CHANNELSUSED + 3] = yawi[FlightMode];
5231  break;
5232  case 11:
5233  SendBuffer[CHANNELSUSED + 3] = yawd[FlightMode];
5234  break;
5235  case 12:
5236  if (ModelType == 0) ModelType = 1; // in case we forgot to define it!
5237  SendBuffer[CHANNELSUSED + 3] = ModelType;
5238  break;
5239  case 13:
5240  SendBuffer[CHANNELSUSED + 3] = BindingNow;
5241  if (BindingNow == 1) {
5242  BindingTimer = millis(); // start a timer
5243  BindingNow = 2;
5244  }
5245  break;
5246  case 14:
5247  SendBuffer[CHANNELSUSED + 3] = uint8_t1; // these are failsafe flags
5248  break;
5249  case 15:
5250  SendBuffer[CHANNELSUSED + 3] = uint8_t2; // these are failsafe flags
5251  break;
5252  case 16:
5253  SendBuffer[CHANNELSUSED + 3] = SaveFailSafeNow; // FailSafeSaveMoment
5254  SaveFailSafeNow = false; // once should do it.
5255  break;
5256  // case 17:
5257  // break;
5258  default: // Goes to 20
5259  break;
5260  }
5261 }
5262 
5263 /************************************************************************************************************/
5264 #ifdef OLD_FHSS
5265 void GetNextHopChannelNumber1()
5266 {
5267  NextFrequency = random(FHSSBottom, FHSSTop);
5268 } // leave this just in case ....
5269 
5270 /************************************************************************************************************/
5271 
5272 void GetNextHopChannelNumber()
5273 {
5274  bool KnownInterferenceChannel = true;
5275 
5276  i = 0;
5277  while (KnownInterferenceChannel && i < BadChannelMax) { // Bug fixed here!!
5278  NextFrequency = random(FHSSBottom, FHSSTop);
5279  KnownInterferenceChannel = false;
5280 
5281  i = 0;
5282  while (i < BadChannelMax && KnownInterferenceChannel == false) {
5283  if (NextFrequency == BadChannels[i]) {
5284  KnownInterferenceChannel = true;
5285 #ifdef DB_CHANNEL_AVOID
5286  Serial.print("Avoiding known interference channel: ");
5287  Serial.println(NextFrequency);
5288  Serial.print(BadChannelPointer);
5289  Serial.print(" bad channels detected so far: ");
5290  for (int j = 0; j < BadChannelPointer; j++) {
5291  Serial.print(BadChannels[j]);
5292  Serial.print(" ");
5293  }
5294  Serial.println(" ");
5295 #endif // defined DB_CHANNEL_AVOID
5296  }
5297  i++;
5298  }
5299  }
5300 }
5301 #endif // OLD_FFHS
5302 /************************************************************************************************************/
5303 
5304 void ReadFMSwitch(bool sw1, bool sw2, bool rev)
5305 {
5306  if (sw1 == false && sw2 == false) FlightMode = 2;
5307  if (rev) {
5308  if (sw1) FlightMode = 1;
5309  if (sw2) FlightMode = 3;
5310  }
5311  else {
5312  if (sw1) FlightMode = 3;
5313  if (sw2) FlightMode = 1;
5314  }
5315 }
5316 
5317 /************************************************************************************************************/
5318 
5319 uint8_t ReadCHSwitch(bool sw1, bool sw2, bool rev)
5320 {
5321  uint8_t ttmp = 90;
5322  if (sw1 == false && sw2 == false) ttmp = 90;
5323  if (rev) {
5324  if (sw1) ttmp = 0;
5325  if (sw2) ttmp = 180;
5326  }
5327  else {
5328  if (sw1) ttmp = 180;
5329  if (sw2) ttmp = 0;
5330  }
5331  return ttmp;
5332 }
5333 
5334 /************************************************************************************************************/
5335 
5336 uint8_t CheckSwitch(uint8_t swt)
5337 {
5338  uint8_t rtv = 90;
5339  if (swt == 1) rtv = ReadCHSwitch(Switch[7], Switch[6], Switch1Reversed);
5340  if (swt == 2) rtv = ReadCHSwitch(Switch[5], Switch[4], Switch2Reversed);
5341  if (swt == 3) rtv = ReadCHSwitch(Switch[0], Switch[1], Switch3Reversed);
5342  if (swt == 4) rtv = ReadCHSwitch(Switch[2], Switch[3], Switch4Reversed);
5343  return rtv;
5344 }
5345 /************************************************************************************************************/
5346 
5347 void GetFlightMode()
5348 { // and AUTO and other switchy things ...
5349 
5350  if (FMSwitch == 4) ReadFMSwitch(Switch[2], Switch[3], Switch4Reversed);
5351  if (FMSwitch == 3) ReadFMSwitch(Switch[0], Switch[1], Switch3Reversed);
5352  if (FMSwitch == 2) ReadFMSwitch(Switch[4], Switch[5], Switch2Reversed);
5353  if (FMSwitch == 1) ReadFMSwitch(Switch[6], Switch[7], Switch1Reversed);
5354  if (AutoSwitch == 1 && Switch[6] == Switch1Reversed) FlightMode = 4; // Flight mode 4 (Auto) overrides modes 1,2,3.
5355  if (AutoSwitch == 2 && Switch[4] == Switch2Reversed) FlightMode = 4;
5356  if (AutoSwitch == 3 && Switch[1] == Switch3Reversed) FlightMode = 4;
5357  if (AutoSwitch == 4 && Switch[3] == Switch4Reversed) FlightMode = 4;
5358 
5359  Channel9SwitchValue = CheckSwitch(Channel9Switch);
5360  Channel10SwitchValue = CheckSwitch(Channel10Switch);
5361  Channel11SwitchValue = CheckSwitch(Channel11Switch);
5362  Channel12SwitchValue = CheckSwitch(Channel12Switch);
5363 
5364  if (FlightMode != PreviousFlightMode) {
5365  SendCommand(NextionWakeUp); // wake screen up if flight mode changes
5366  LastSeconds = 0; // Just to force redisplay of timer
5367  if (PreviousFlightMode == 4) { // Start or restart timer when auto goes off
5368  TimerMillis = millis();
5369  }
5370 
5371  if (FlightMode == 4) { // Pause timer when auto on
5372  PausedSecs = Secs + (Mins * 60) + (Hours * 3600); // Remember how long so far
5373  }
5374 
5375  CheckTimer(); // update timer
5376 
5377  if (CurrentView == FrontView) {
5378  ShowFlightMode();
5379  }
5380 
5381  if (CurrentView == GainsView) { // Save gains settings when changing flight mode
5382  SaveFlightMode = FlightMode;
5383  FlightMode = PreviousFlightMode;
5384  SaveNewGains();
5385  FlightMode = SaveFlightMode;
5386  }
5387 
5388  UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
5389  if (CurrentView == GraphView) DisplayCurve();
5390  }
5391  PreviousFlightMode = FlightMode;
5392 }
5393 
5394 /************************************************************************************************************/
5395 
5396 void ReadSwitches()
5397 {
5398  for (i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
5399  if (!digitalRead(SwitchNumber[i])) {
5400  Switch[i] = true;
5401  }
5402  else {
5403  Switch[i] = false;
5404  }
5405 #ifdef DB_SWITCHES
5406  Serial.print("Switch ");
5407  Serial.print(i);
5408  Serial.print(" = ");
5409  Serial.println(Switch[i]);
5410 #endif
5411  }
5412  GetFlightMode();
5413 }
5414 
5415 /************************************************************************************************************/
5416 
5417 void GetRXVersionNumber()
5418 {
5419  char nbuf[5];
5420 
5421  Str(ReceiverVersionNumber, AckPayload.Pitch, 2);
5422  Str(nbuf, AckPayload.Roll, 2);
5423  strcat(ReceiverVersionNumber, nbuf);
5424  Str(nbuf, AckPayload.Yaw, 0);
5425  strcat(ReceiverVersionNumber, nbuf);
5426  Str(nbuf, AckPayload.CurrentAltitude,0);
5427  strcpy(ThisRadio,nbuf);
5428 }
5429 
5430 
5431 /************************************************************************************************************/
5432 
5433 void ClearAckPayload()
5434 {
5435  AckPayload.volt = 0;
5436  AckPayload.Pitch = 0;
5437  AckPayload.Roll = 0;
5438  AckPayload.Yaw = 0;
5439  AckPayload.CurrentAltitude = 0;
5440  AckPayload.Purpose |= 0x80;
5441 }
5442 
5443 /************************************************************************************************************/
5444 
5445 void GetRXTime(){ // this gets the time from Recevier to enable FHSS synch
5446  union
5447  {
5448  uint32_t Stamp32;
5449  uint8_t Stamp8[4];
5450  }Time; // union used to allow access to each byte of 32 bit value
5451 
5452 
5453  Time.Stamp8[0] = AckPayload.volt;
5454  Time.Stamp8[1] = AckPayload.CurrentAltitude;
5455  Time.Stamp8[2] = AckPayload.Roll;
5456  Time.Stamp8[3] = AckPayload.Yaw;
5457  ClearAckPayload();
5458  // Serial.println (Time.Stamp32); // Time.Stamp32 now has time from receiver!
5459 
5460 }
5461 
5462 /************************************************************************************************************/
5463 void ParseAckPayload()
5464 {
5465  if (!(AckPayload.Purpose & 0x80)) // High BIT ON = IGNORE i.e. skip the whole thing
5466  {
5467  switch (AckPayload.Purpose) // Only looking at the low 7 BITS
5468  // High BIT is guaranteed LOW by this point, so no "& 0x7F" is needed.
5469  {
5470  case 0:
5471  VoltsDetected = false;
5472  if (AckPayload.volt > 0) // zero volts means RX volts are not available
5473  {
5474  Str(ModelVolts, AckPayload.volt, 0); // Get receiver battery volts, if available.
5475  VoltsDetected = true;
5476  }
5477  Str(ModelAltitude, AckPayload.CurrentAltitude, 0);
5478  Str(ModelPitch, AckPayload.Pitch, 0);
5479  Str(ModelYaw, AckPayload.Yaw, 0);
5480  Str(ModelRoll, AckPayload.Roll, 0);
5481  break;
5482  case 1:
5483  GetRXVersionNumber();
5484  break;
5485  case 2: // By this means a time synch is enabled every third packet
5486  GetRXTime();
5487  break;
5488  default:
5489  break;
5490  }
5491  }
5492 }
5493 /************************************************************************************************************/
5494 void CheckGapsLength()
5495 {
5496  if (ReconnectingFlag) {
5497  ReconnectingFlag = false;
5498 #ifdef DB_CHANNEL_AVOID
5499  Serial.print("Reconnect time: ");
5500  Serial.print((millis() - ReconnectTime) / 1000);
5501  Serial.println(" seconds.");
5502 #endif
5503  }
5504  if (GapStart > 0) { // if Reconnected, how long was connection lost?
5505  ThisGap = millis() - GapStart;
5506  if (ThisGap > GapLongest) {
5507  GapLongest = ThisGap;
5508  }
5509  GapSum += ThisGap;
5510  GapStart = 0;
5511  }
5512 }
5513 
5514 
5515 /************************************************************************************************************/
5516 // LOOP
5517 /************************************************************************************************************/
5518 
5519 void loop()
5520 {
5521 
5522  KickTheDog(); // Watchdog
5523  if (millis() - LastTimeRead >= 1000) {
5524  ReadTime();
5525  LastTimeRead = millis();
5526  } // Do the clock!
5527  if (millis() - RangeTestStart >= 1000) {
5528  GetStatistics();
5529  RangeTestStart = millis();
5530  } // Do stats
5531  if ((millis() - ShowServoTimer >= 100) && (CurrentView != FrontView)) {
5532  ShowServoPos();
5533  ShowServoTimer = millis();
5534  } // Show servos positions
5535  if (GetButtonPress()) {
5536  Button_was_pressed();
5537  } // Deal with button!
5538 
5539  if ((millis() - TxOnTime) > 2000) { // Transmit nothing for 1.5 seconds
5540  switch (CurrentMode) {
5541  case 0:
5542  SendData();
5543  break;
5544  case 1:
5545  CalibrateSticks();
5546  break;
5547  case 2:
5548  ChannelCentres();
5549  break;
5550  case 3:
5551  ScanAllChannels();
5552  break;
5553  default:
5554  break; // CurrentMode >= 4 for no action at all.
5555  }
5556  }
5557 
5558  if (BindingNow == 2 && (millis() - BindingTimer) > 100) {
5559  if (!BoundFlag) {
5560 #ifdef DB_BIND
5561  Serial.println("Binding now");
5562 #endif
5563  SetThePipe(NewPipe);
5564  BindingNow = 0;
5565  BoundFlag = true;
5566  LostPackets = 0; // Start afresh!
5567  GapLongest = 0;
5568  GapSum = 0;
5569  GreenLedOn();
5570  MakeBindButtonInvisible();
5571  }
5572  SendText(BindScreenBox, BindDonemsg);
5573  }
5574 } // end loop()
DoScanEnd
void DoScanEnd()
